i: Ministry of Ecology and Natural Resources — Umweltbehörde. KazMunayGas — the national oil company. EITI Kazakhstan — member since 2007. Note: Civil society space is severely constrained.

NCOC (North Caspian Operating Company) — manages Kashagan (Shell, TotalEnergies, Eni, ExxonMobil, KMG, CNPC, Inpex). TCO (Tengizchevroil) — manages Tengiz (Chevron 50%, ExxonMobil 25%, KMG 20%, Lukoil 5%).

Ministry of Energy — oversees oil, gas, and energy policy. Samruk-Kazyna — the national wealth fund holding state shares in KazMunayGas and other state enterprises. National Fund of the Republic of Kazakhstan — the sovereign wealth fund (managed by the National Bank) with $55B+ in assets.

Note: Kazakhstan under President Tokayev is rated 'Not Free.' The Mazhilis (lower house, 107 members) and Senate (50 members) do not function independently. International channels: EITI, Tehran Convention (Caspian Umwelt- cooperation), SCO (Shanghai Cooperation Organisation), OSCE.

LA.s: Landlocked Southeast Asian Wirtschaft ($16.5B BIP) with agriculture at 16.8% BIP and Bergbau at 3.89%. Major hydropower producer (dam exports to Thailand). One-party state. Severe debt crisis ($13B+ external debt, primarily to China).

sectors.w: Laos's Bergbau sector (gold, copper, potash) generates water contamination and community displacement. Wenn Umwelt- monitoring data is published alongside Bergbau revenue, W wird berechenbar.
bp: Environmental bonds for Bergbau licenses. Wenn remediation costs are pre-funded, marginal operations become uneconomic.
Per-mine Umwelt- data disclosure through international operator reporting. Making Umwelt- costs visible makes W computable.
Teilweise brechbar. Mining disturbs landscapes but improved management can reduce impact.

Note: National Assembly (164 members) is controlled by LPRP. International channels: ASEAN, Mekong River Commission, Asian Entwickelnment Bank, World Bank.

LB.s: Collapsed Wirtschaft ($20.1B BIP, down from $55B in 2018). Banking sector crisis wiped out savings. Services historically dominated. Political system based on sectarian power-sharing (confessionalism). Multiple concurrent crises — economic, political, refugee.

sectors.w: Lebanon's banking sector collapse (2019-present) represents a PST endgame — the überlappendes Interesse has already partially broken through crisis. The remaining PST is in the lack of accountability for banking sector losses.
bp: Banking sector restructuring with full forensic audit of capital outflows. Wenn accountability is established for the $72B+ in depositor losses, the überlappendes Interesse between banks, politicians, and central bank in opacity breaks.
Publication of forensic audit results (Alvarez & Marsal was contracted but access was blocked). Making the flow of funds visible makes W computable.
Teilweise brechbar — the crisis has already revealed Systemabhängigkeit. But without institutional reform, the same dynamics can rebuild.

i: SIC (Special Investigation Commission) — Lebanon's financial intelligence unit. BDL (Banque du Liban / Central Bank) — the central bank whose financial engineering scheme is at the center of the crisis. Note: Lebanon has some of the region's strongest press freedom.
ABL (Association of Banks in Lebanon) — represents 60+ banks. BDL — the central bank. Lebanon's banking sector losses are estimated at $72B+.
Banking Control Commission — the banking supervisor. IMF — Lebanon reached a staff-level agreement in 2022 but reforms remain unimplemented.

Note: Lebanon's parliament (128 members, elected on confessional basis) is functional but deeply divided. The political system is paralyzed by sectarian power-sharing. International channels: IMF, World Bank, CEDRE conference donors, French-led international support group.

LK.s: Island Wirtschaft ($99B BIP) recovering from 2022 economic crisis. Landwirtschaft bei 8.3% BIP (tea, rubber, coconut). Verarbeitendes Gewerbe bei 17.6% (garments). Tourism significant. Post-crisis IMF program. Historically one of Asia's highest human development indicators.

sectors.w: Sri Lanka's 2021 overnight organic farming mandate (banning chemical fertilizers) demonstrated how agricultural Systemabhängigkeit works — it caused immediate crop failure. The lesson: gradual transition with data makes W computable.
bp: Gradual agricultural transition with per-farm soil health monitoring (learning from the 2021 failure). Wenn transition is evidence-based rather than ideological, das überlappende Interesse an chemical-dependent monoculture wird geschwächt sustainably.
Per-estate Umwelt- data for tea, rubber, and coconut published alongside export revenue. Sri Lanka's Tea Research Institute collects data — making it public makes W computable.
Teilweise brechbar. Sri Lanka's 2021 experiment showed both the reality of Systemabhängigkeit (sudden decoupling fails) and its reducibility (gradual transition with soil biology rebuilding works).

Major plantation companies: Kelani Valley Plantations, Bogawantalawa Tea Estates. Sri Lanka Tea Board — regulates the tea industry.
Ministry of Agriculture — oversees agricultural policy. Sri Lanka Tea Board — manages quality standards and exports.

Parliament of Sri Lanka (225 members). Contact through parliament.lk. Sri Lanka is a semi-presidential republic. EU GSP+ — Sri Lanka benefits from preferential trade access contingent on human rights and Umwelt- governance.

LT.s: Baltic EU and Eurozone member ($84.9B BIP). Dienstleistungen bei 63.6% BIP. Verarbeitendes Gewerbe bei 14% BIP. Achieved energy independence from Russian gas (Klaipėda LNG terminal). Landwirtschaft bei 2.6% BIP.

LU.s: Major EU financial center ($93.3B BIP, highest BIP per capita globally). Dienstleistungen bei 81.2% BIP. World's second-largest investment fund domicile (after US). EU institutions host. Steel industry legacy (ArcelorMittal).

bp: Full EU SFDR and AMLD implementation. Wenn fund-level financed Emissionen and beneficial ownership are transparent, das überlappende Interesse an opaque financial intermediation wird geschwächt.

Chambre des Députés — unicameral parliament, 60 members. Contact through chd.lu. Luxembourg was instrumental in establishing the EU Green Bond Standard and hosts the Luxembourg Green Exchange.

LV.s: Baltic EU and Eurozone member ($43.7B BIP). Dienstleistungen bei 64.6% BIP. Forestry significant. Landwirtschaft bei 4% BIP. Post-Soviet economic transformation. NATO member.

LY.s: Oil-dependent fragile state ($48.5B BIP) with 60.96% combined oil and gas rents — one of the world's highest. NOC (National Oil Corporation) manages production (~1.2M bpd when not disrupted). Divided governance (Tripoli vs. eastern-based authorities). Ongoing instability since 2011.

sectors.w: Libya's oil production is repeatedly disrupted by factional conflict (fields and export terminals seized as bargaining chips). The überlappendes Interesse is already partially broken by instability — production is not reliably monetizable.
bp: Governance reform that depoliticizes oil revenue distribution. Wenn oil revenue is managed through transparent, rules-based mechanisms (rather than factional control), das überlappende Interesse an capturing oil infrastructure wird geschwächt.
NOC pro Feld production and revenue data disclosure. The Libyan Audit Bureau provides some oversight — extending to Umwelt- data makes W computable.
Nicht brechbar. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

i: NOC (National Oil Corporation) — manages Libya's oil sector. Libyan Audit Bureau — provides financial oversight. UN Panel of Experts on Libya — monitors Sanktionen compliance and resource governance.
NOC — the national oil company operating most production. Eni, TotalEnergies, Repsol, ConocoPhillips — major international operators.
CBL (Central Bank of Libya) — manages oil revenue. The division of the CBL between Tripoli and eastern-based institutions has complicated revenue management.

Note: Libya has no functioning unified government or elected legislature. The House of Representatives (Tobruk) and High Council of State (Tripoli) are rival bodies. International channels: UN Support Mission in Libya (UNSMIL), African Union, Arab League.

MA.s: North African Wirtschaft ($160.6B BIP) with agriculture at 10.6% BIP and growing erneuerbare Energie sector (Noor-Ouarzazate solar complex). Major phosphate producer (OCP Group — world's largest). Verarbeitendes Gewerbe bei 15.3% BIP.

sectors.w: Morocco controls 70%+ of global phosphate reserves (OCP Group). Phosphate Bergbau generates cadmium-contaminated waste and depletes water in arid regions. Wenn pro Mine Umwelt- data is published alongside production revenue, W wird berechenbar.
bp: Internalize water and cadmium remediation costs into phosphate pricing. Wenn OCP pays for water depletion in already water-stressed regions, das überlappende Interesse an low-cost extraction wird geschwächt.

Mandatory pro Mine Umwelt- disclosure (water use, cadmium levels, waste volumes). OCP already publishes sustainability reports — extending to independently verifiable pro Mine data makes W computable.
Teilweise brechbar. Phosphate rock inherently contains cadmium. However, cadmium removal technologies exist and can reduce Systemabhängigkeit.

Ministry of Energy, Mines and Environment — oversees Bergbau and Umwelt- policy. ONEE — manages water supply infrastructure.
Parlement du Maroc — bicameral: Chambre des Représentants (395 members) and Chambre des Conseillers (120 members). Morocco is a konstitutionelle Monarchie with an elected parliament.

MC.s: City-state ($11.1B BIP) with 87.2% services. Major financial center and tourism hub. No income tax for individuals. World's highest BIP per capita and population density. Limited PST exposure except through financial intermediation.

MD.s: Small Eastern European Wirtschaft ($18.2B BIP). Landwirtschaft bei 7.1% BIP (wine, agriculture). Dienstleistungen bei 62.3%. EU-Kandidat country (2022). Significant remittance dependence. Energy dependent on Russian gas (via Transnistria).

Teilweise brechbar. Grain monoculture degrades soil. Crop rotation and cover cropping can reduce Systemabhängigkeit.

MG.s: Biodiversity hotspot Wirtschaft ($17.4B BIP). Landwirtschaft bei 22.5% BIP. One of Earth's most biodiverse countries (90%+ species endemic). Devastating Entwaldung (fr=5.45% forest rents). Mining growing (ilmenite, nickel). Extreme poverty.

bp: Alternative livelihood programs replacing tavy with agroforestry. Wenn tree-crop income exceeds slash-and-burn yields, das überlappende Interesse an forest clearing breaks.

Extreme Systemabhängigkeit. Tavy on degraded laterite soils causes erosion and desertification. Madagascar's red soil runoff is visible from space.

MK.s: Small Western Balkan Wirtschaft ($17B BIP). Verarbeitendes Gewerbe bei 14.3% BIP. Dienstleistungen bei 56.2%. EU-Kandidat country. Coal-dependent energy. Landwirtschaft bei 6.1% BIP.

Sobranie (Assembly of North Macedonia) — unicameral, 120 members. EU-Kandidat country.

ML.s: Sahelian Wirtschaft ($26.8B BIP) with gold Bergbau (16.18% BIP) and agriculture (33.3% BIP). Military junta since 2020-2021 coups. Security crisis (jihadist insurgency). Third-largest gold producer in Africa.

Note: Military transition government. National Transitional Council replaces elected legislature. International channels: ECOWAS (Mali suspended), African Union, EITI Board.

MM.s: Resource-rich Wirtschaft ($74.1B BIP) under military junta since 2021 coup. Gasrenten 4.4%. Jade and gem Bergbau (est. $31B/year — more than formal BIP). Landwirtschaft bei 20.8% BIP. Civil war affecting multiple regions.

Supply chain Transparenz for jade and gems using blockchain traceability. Global Witness and others have documented the flows — formalizing this breaks system independence.
Teilweise brechbar. Mining inherently disturbs landscapes. Myanmar's jade mines in Kachin State have caused catastrophic landslides.

MN.s: Resource-dependent landlocked Wirtschaft ($23.8B BIP). Mining at 26.57% BIP (copper, coal, gold). Coal at 4.89% BIP. Oyu Tolgoi copper-gold mine (Rio Tinto/Turquoise Hill). Parliamentary Demokratie — rare in the region.

Per-mine Umwelt- monitoring data published through EITI Mongolia. Macht W berechenbar.
Teilweise brechbar. Mining in arid environments inherently affects limited water resources. However, dry processing and water recycling can reduce dependence.

MO.s: Casino and tourism Wirtschaft ($49.5B BIP). Dienstleistungen bei 83.8% BIP. World's largest gambling market (pre-COVID revenue $36B/year). Under Chinese sovereignty. Highly concentrated gambling concession system.

sectors.w: Macao's gambling industry generates significant social costs (problem gambling, money laundering) that are not captured in concession revenues. Wenn social cost data is published alongside gross gaming revenue, W wird berechenbar.
bp: Mandatory gambling harm data disclosure per concession. Wenn social costs are visible alongside revenues, das überlappende Interesse an revenue maximization without harm mitigation wird geschwächt.
DICJ publication of problem gambling prevalence, social cost estimates, and AML compliance data per concessionaire. Macht W berechenbar.
Teilweise brechbar. Gambling inherently creates addiction risk. However, harm reduction measures (exclusion programs, betting limits) can reduce Systemabhängigkeit.

MU.s: Upper-middle-income island Wirtschaft ($14.9B BIP). Dienstleistungen bei 64.4% (financial services, tourism). Verarbeitendes Gewerbe bei 11.1% (textiles). Successful economic diversification from sugar to services. Strong institutions.

i: FSC — the integrated financial services regulator. FIU — financial intelligence unit.
Mauritius hosts ~900 Global Business companies (Category 1 and 2). Major banks: SBM Holdings, MCB Group.
FSC — regulates the Global Business sector. Bank of Mauritius — the central bank. Mauritius was on the FATF grey list (2020-2021) and implemented reforms.
National Assembly of Mauritius — 70 members. Mauritius is a parlamentarisch Demokratie with strong democratic traditions since independence (1968).

MW.s: Low-income Wirtschaft ($11.3B BIP). Landwirtschaft bei 31.8% BIP — tobacco is the largest export (50%+ of export revenue). One of the world's poorest countries. High climate vulnerability.

sectors.w: Malawi's tobacco dependence is an economic PST — tobacco demand is declining globally while the crop depletes soil. As WHO FCTC reduces demand, the überlappendes Interesse between tobacco growers and buyers wird geschwächt.
bp: Crop diversification as global tobacco demand declines. Wenn alternative crops (legumes, macadamia, soy) provide comparable income, das überlappende Interesse an tobacco monoculture breaks.
Publication of Bodendegradation and health cost data alongside tobacco revenue. Macht W berechenbar.
Tobacco cultivation depletes soil nutrients and requires heavy pesticide use. Crop rotation can reduce Systemabhängigkeit.
a: Melden an EAD (Environmental Affairs Department)
Document child labor — report to Ministry of Labour
Report through tobacco buyer compliance channels (BAT, JTI)
Limbe Leaf (Alliance One), JTI: Support farmer diversification programs
Investieren in alternative crop development
Übernehmen Sustainable Tobacco Programme standards
Tobacco Commission: Support diversification transition
Ministry of Agriculture: Scale alternative crop programs
TCC (Tobacco Control Commission): Umsetzen WHO FCTC provisions

Support WHO FCTC alternative livelihood provisions for tobacco-growing countries
Advocate for international climate finance for agricultural transition
Drängen auf fair trade tobacco pricing during transition period
i: EAD (Environmental Affairs Department) — Umweltbehörde. Ministry of Labour — enforces child labor laws.
Limbe Leaf (Alliance One International subsidiary) — the largest tobacco buyer. JTI, BAT — international tobacco companies sourcing from Malawi.
Tobacco Commission (now TCC — Tobacco Control Commission) — regulates the tobacco sector. Ministry of Agriculture, Irrigation and Water Entwickelnment.
National Assembly of Malawi — 193 members. Malawi is a presidential Demokratie. WHO FCTC Articles 17-18 require support for economically viable alternatives to tobacco growing.

MY.s: Upper-middle-income Wirtschaft ($422.2B BIP). World's second-largest palm oil producer. Oil and gas at 5.2% rents (Petronas). Verarbeitendes Gewerbe bei 22.5% BIP (electronics, automotive). Dienstleistungen bei 53.7%.

sectors.w: Malaysia produces ~25% of global palm oil. EUDR and MSPO certification create traceability frameworks. Wenn pro Anlageation Umwelt- data is linked to trade, W wird berechenbar.
bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-Entwaldung traceability. Wenn buyers verify origin, das überlappende Interesse an forest conversion for plantations breaks.
Mandatory MSPO (Malaysian Sustainable Palmöl) certification with independently verifiable Umwelt- data per estate. Macht W berechenbar.
Teilweise brechbar. Palm oil monoculture reduces biodiversity. But yield improvement on existing plantations can reduce expansion pressure.
a: Melden an DOE (Department of Environment)
Document labor violations — report to HR Ministry
Report through RSPO complaint mechanisms
Sime Darby, IOI, FGV: Achieve 100% RSPO certification
Übernehmen zero-Entwaldung and no-peat commitments
Umsetzen full supply chain traceability
MPOB: Stärken MSPO certification Umwelt- criteria
DOE: Durchsetzen peatland drainage regulations
MPIC (Ministry of Plantation Industries): Mandate full traceability

Support EUDR implementation with transition assistance for smallholders
Eintreten über ASEAN for regional zero-Entwaldung commitments
Drängen auf RSPO-MSPO mutual recognition with enhanced Umwelt- standards
i: DOE (Jabatan Alam Sekitar / Department of Environment) — Umweltbehörde. SUHAKAM (Human Rights Commission of Malaysia) — investigates rights complaints including in palm oil sector. RSPO — Malaysia co-hosts the RSPO Secretariat.

Sime Darby Plantation — world's largest palm oil company by planted area. IOI Corporation, FGV (Felda Global Ventures) — major plantation companies. MPOB (Malaysian Palmöl Board) — the government agency overseeing the palm oil industry.
MPOB — oversees palm oil industry regulation and research. MSPO (Malaysian Sustainable Palmöl) — the national mandatory certification scheme.

Parliament of Malaysia — bicameral: Dewan Rakyat (222 members) and Dewan Negara (70 members). Contact through parlimen.gov.my. Malaysia is a federal konstitutionelle Monarchie and parlamentarisch Demokratie.

MZ.s: Resource-rich developing Wirtschaft ($22.7B BIP). Major gas discoveries (Rovuma Basin — among world's largest LNG projects). Coal at 3.78%, gas at 3.57%. Landwirtschaft bei 25.2% BIP. Insurgency in Cabo Delgado province near gas projects.

sectors.w: Mozambique's Rovuma Basin LNG projects (TotalEnergies, ExxonMobil, Eni) are among the world's largest but face force majeure due to insurgency. Wenn per-project Umwelt- and social cost data is published, W wird berechenbar.
bp: Conditional development — LNG projects proceed only with binding community benefit and Umwelt- standards. Wenn development is linked to social outcomes, das überlappende Interesse an extraction without accountability wird geschwächt.
Per-project Umwelt- disclosure for all Rovuma Basin operations. Macht W berechenbar.
Nicht brechbar. LNG production and combustion release CO₂ and methane.
a: Melden an MITADER (Ministry of Land, Environment and Rural Entwickelnment)
Document community displacement — report to international accountability mechanisms
Report through TotalEnergies/ExxonMobil/Eni compliance channels
TotalEnergies (Mozambique LNG), ExxonMobil (Rovuma LNG), Eni (Coral FLNG): Umsetzen community development and Umwelt- standards
Übernehmen TCFD reporting
Address security and human rights risks per UN Voluntary Principles
INP: Stärken Umwelt- licensing for LNG projects
MIREME (Ministry of Mineral Resources and Energy): Ensure sovereign wealth fund for gas revenues
Bank of Mozambique: Prepare for resource revenue macroeconomic management
Kontaktieren Sie Ihren Deputado in the Assembleia da República (250 members) um zu fordern transparent management of gas revenues
Support EITI enhanced reporting for Mozambique's gas sector
Advocate for Cabo Delgado stabilization with Umwelt- governance
Drängen auf sovereign wealth fund establishment before major LNG revenues flow
i: MITADER — environment ministry. INP (Instituto Nacional de Petróleo) — the petroleum regulator. Note: Mozambique has limited Hinweisgeber protections. The Cabo Delgado insurgency complicates Zivilgesellschaft operations in the gas-rich north.

TotalEnergies — leads the $20B Mozambique LNG project (currently under force majeure). ExxonMobil — leads Rovuma LNG. Eni — operates Coral South FLNG. ENH (Empresa Nacional de Hidrocarbonetos) — the national hydrocarbons company.
INP — the petroleum regulator. MIREME — oversees energy and Bergbau policy. EITI Mozambique — member since 2012.
Assembleia da República de Moçambique — 250 members. Mozambique is a presidential republic. EITI membership since 2012.

NA.s: Upper-middle-income Wirtschaft ($13.4B BIP) with Bergbau at 3.17% (uranium, diamonds). Landwirtschaft bei 7.3% BIP. One of Africa's most stable democracies. Major new oil discoveries offshore (TotalEnergies, Shell). Green hydrogen ambitions.

sectors.w: Namibia's uranium Bergbau (Rössing, Husab — two of world's largest) generates radioactive waste and water issues in the Namib Desert. Wenn pro Mine Umwelt- monitoring is published, W wird berechenbar.
bp: Environmental bonds and water-use fees for uranium Bergbau. Wenn miners pay for water in one of Earth's driest environments, das überlappende Interesse an water-intensive extraction wird geschwächt.
Per-mine Umwelt- monitoring disclosure. Macht W berechenbar.
Teilweise brechbar. Uranium Bergbau generates radioactive tailings. Improved containment can reduce but not eliminate Systemabhängigkeit.

Support IAEA Umwelt- standards for uranium producing countries
Advocate for African Mining Vision implementation

i: MEFT — environment ministry. NRPA — radiation protection authority. Namibia has relatively strong Zivilgesellschaft for the region.
Rössing Uranium — one of world's largest (Rio Tinto). Husab mine — CNNC/CGN (Chinese staatliches). Namibia also has significant diamond Bergbau (Namdeb — De Beers/government JV).
MME — oversees Bergbau policy. Chamber of Mines of Namibia — the industry association.

Parliament of Namibia — bicameral: National Assembly (104 members) and National Council (42 members). Contact through parliament.na. Namibia is a presidential Demokratie with strong democratic credentials since independence (1990).

NE.s: Sahelian Wirtschaft ($19.9B BIP). Landwirtschaft bei 34.5% BIP. Uranium Bergbau (Arlit — supplies ~5% of world production, Orano/formerly Areva). Oil production growing. Military junta since July 2023 coup.

sectors.w: Niger's uranium Bergbau (Orano operations at Arlit) generates radioactive tailings in water-scarce Sahel. Environmental monitoring data makes W computable.
bp: Environmental bonds for uranium operations. Wenn remediation costs are pre-funded, überlappendes Interesse in extraction without accountability wird geschwächt.
Per-mine Umwelt- monitoring. Macht W berechenbar.
Teilweise brechbar. Uranium Bergbau generates long-lived radioactive waste. Containment reduces but doesn't eliminate Systemabhängigkeit.

Support EITI enhanced reporting
i: BNEE (Bureau National d'Évaluation Environnementale) — Umwelt- assessment authority. Note: Military rule since July 2023.
Orano — operates SOMAÏR and COMINAK uranium mines at Arlit (COMINAK closed 2021). Chinese companies (CNNPC) have expanding uranium interests.
Ministry of Mines — oversees Bergbau policy. EITI Niger — member since 2005.
Note: Military junta since July 2023. CNSP (Conseil National pour la Sauvegarde de la Patrie). ECOWAS suspended Niger. International channels: African Union, IAEA, EITI Board.

NI.s: Small Central American Wirtschaft ($19.7B BIP). Landwirtschaft bei 14.4% BIP. Mining at 2.68% (gold). Authoritarian governance under Ortega. Dienstleistungen bei 46.8%.

sectors.w: Nicaragua's gold Bergbau generates mercury and cyanide contamination. Wenn Umwelt- data is published, W wird berechenbar.
bp: Supply chain due diligence for gold sourced from Nicaragua.
Environmental monitoring per mine makes W computable.
Teilweise brechbar. Mercury-free processing can reduce impact.

i: MARENA (Ministry of Environment) — Umweltbehörde. Note: Nicaragua under Ortega is highly autoritär. Civil society is repressed.
Calibre Mining — operates gold mines in Nicaragua. B2Gold — formerly operated La Libertad mine.
Ministry of Energy and Mines — Bergbau regulator.
Note: Asamblea Nacional (92 members) is controlled by FSLN. International channels: OAS (though Nicaragua withdrew), UN Human Rights Council, IACHR.

NP.s: Mountainous South Asian Wirtschaft ($42.9B BIP). Landwirtschaft bei 21.9% BIP. Massive hydropower potential (~83 GW technically feasible, only ~2.3 GW developed). Remittances ~25% of BIP. Climate-vulnerable (glacial lake outburst floods).

sectors.w: Nepal's agriculture on steep hillsides causes erosion and landslides. Wenn per-district soil loss and water quality data is linked to agricultural output, W wird berechenbar.
bp: Reformieren agricultural support toward terracing and agroforestry on hillsides. Wenn hillside farmers are incentivized to conserve soil, das überlappende Interesse an unsustainable cultivation wird geschwächt.
Per-district soil erosion and water quality monitoring. Macht W berechenbar.
Teilweise brechbar. Agriculture on steep slopes inherently risks erosion. Traditional terracing can reduce Systemabhängigkeit.

i: DoE — Umweltbehörde under MOFE (Ministry of Forests and Environment). Nepal's 2015 Constitution devolves significant authority to local governments.
Nepal's agricultural sector is predominantly smallholder. Hydropower companies (NEA, private developers) have interests in watershed health.
MoALD (Ministry of Agriculture and Livestock Entwickelnment). DSCWM — responsible for soil conservation programs.
Federal Parliament — bicameral: Pratinidhi Sabha (275 members) and Rashtriya Sabha (59 members). Nepal is a federal democratic republic since 2008.

NZ.s: Advanced Wirtschaft ($260.2B BIP) with intensive dairy farming driving agricultural exports. Landwirtschaft bei 4.4% BIP but outsized Umwelt- footprint (dairy is largest export sector). Dienstleistungen bei 64.6%. Strong democratic institutions. Ambitious climate targets.

sectors.w: New Zealand's dairy intensification (6.3M dairy cows) has degraded waterways (nitrogen and E. coli contamination). Wenn per-farm nutrient discharge data is published alongside farm revenue, W wird berechenbar.
bp: Umsetzen the NPS-FM (National Policy Statement for Freshwater Management 2020) requiring bottom lines for water quality. Wenn farmers face enforceable nutrient caps, das überlappende Interesse an herd expansion wird geschwächt.
Farm Environment Plans with mandatory public nutrient discharge data. NZ's 'He Waka Eke Noa' partnership generates farm-level data — public disclosure makes W computable.
Teilweise brechbar. Ruminant digestion produces methane biologically. Feed additives can reduce but not eliminate enteric methane. Riparian planting reduces but doesn't eliminate nutrient runoff.
a: Melden an regional councils (Canterbury, Waikato — primary water quality enforcers)
Document water quality violations — report to MfE (Ministry for the Environment)
Use NZ Protected Disclosures Act 2022
Fonterra: Übernehmen binding waterway protection targets across all supplier farms
Umsetzen methane reduction technology (Kowbucha, Zelp)
Diversify cooperative revenue beyond dairy commodity
MfE: Durchsetzen NPS-FM bottom lines for nitrogen and E. coli in waterways
MPI (Ministry for Primary Industries): Reformieren farm support toward Umwelt- outcomes
EPA: Stärken agricultural chemical regulation

Support NZ Emissions Trading Scheme inclusion of agricultural Emissionen (planned by 2025, now uncertain)
Advocate for Comprehensive and Progressive Agreement for Trans-Pacific Partnership (CPTPP) Umwelt- provisions
Drängen auf inclusion of biological methane in national Emissionen reduction targets
i: Regional councils — the primary Umwelt- regulators under the Resource Management Act (RMA). MfE (Ministry for the Environment) — sets national Umwelt- policy. NZ Protected Disclosures (Protection of Whistleblowers) Act 2022 — strong Hinweisgeber protection.
Fonterra Co-operative Group — the world's largest dairy exporter, processing ~80% of NZ milk. Fonterra's procurement standards directly influence ~10,000 dairy farms.
NPS-FM (National Policy Statement for Freshwater Management 2020) — requires regional councils to set limits on resource use to achieve Umwelt- bottom lines. MPI — oversees primary sector policy.

New Zealand Parliament (House of Representatives, 120 members, MMP electoral system). Contact through parliament.nz. NZ Climate Change Response (Zero Carbon) Amendment Act 2019 sets separate targets for biogenic methane.

OM.s: Oil-dependent Gulf Wirtschaft ($107.1B BIP) with 29.21% combined oil and gas rents. PDO (Petroleum Entwickelnment Oman, 60% government, 34% Shell) is the main operator. Diversifying through Oman Vision 2040. Hydrogen ambitions.

sectors.w: Oman's oil production uses enhanced oil recovery (EOR) including solar-powered steam injection. As EOR costs rise on mature fields, diversification to green hydrogen becomes economically rational.
bp: Green hydrogen investment as alternative export commodity. Oman has committed $30B+ to green hydrogen projects. Wenn hydrogen revenue streams are established, das überlappende Interesse an oil dependence wird geschwächt.
Per-field Emissionen disclosure for all PDO and other operator operations. Macht W berechenbar.
Nicht brechbar. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

Report through PDO/Shell compliance channels
PDO: Accelerate erneuerbare Energie integration in operations
OQ (state energy company): Entwickeln green hydrogen export capacity
Umsetzen TCFD reporting

EA: Stärken Umwelt- standards
CBO (Central Bank of Oman): Climate risk in financial supervision

Support IRENA recommendations on Gulf state transition

i: Environment Authority (EA) — Oman's Umwelt- regulator. PDO (Petroleum Entwickelnment Oman) — Shell manages PDO operations.
PDO — produces ~70% of Oman's oil. OQ (formerly Oman Oil Company) — the state energy holding company. Hydrom — the government entity driving Oman's green hydrogen ambitions.
Ministry of Energy and Minerals — oversees energy policy. Hydrom — manages green hydrogen project tenders.
Majlis Oman — bicameral: Majlis al-Shura (86 elected) and Majlis al-Dawla (86 appointed). Oman is a sultanate with limited but growing parlamentarisch activity.

PA.s: Services-dominant Wirtschaft ($86.5B BIP) with the Panama Canal generating significant revenue. Financial services hub. Mining at 3.58% (Cobre Panamá copper mine — First Quantum, closed by Supreme Court ruling 2023). Dienstleistungen bei 69.3%.

sectors.w: Panama's Supreme Court ruled the Cobre Panamá Bergbau contract unconstitutional in November 2023, following massive public protests. The überlappendes Interesse between the Bergbau company and government has been broken by democratic action.
bp: The Cobre Panamá precedent — democratic rejection of Bergbau contracts that do not serve the public interest. This is a direct break of the überlappendes Interesse through civic action and judicial review.
Environmental monitoring of mine closure and remediation. Making closure costs visible makes W computable.
Teilweise brechbar. The mine exists — remediation is needed regardless. Closure reduces ongoing Systemabhängigkeit.

Document water quality downstream of Cobre Panamá
Report through First Quantum compliance channels
First Quantum: Cooperate with orderly mine closure and Umwelt- remediation
Ensure worker transition support
Comply with Supreme Court ruling
MiAmbiente: Ensure comprehensive Umwelt- remediation
Ministry of Commerce: Support economic transition for affected communities
Comptroller General: Audit Bergbau revenue management
Kontaktieren Sie Ihren Diputado in the Asamblea Nacional (71 members) um zu fordern comprehensive mine closure and remediation legislation
Support the Cobre Panamá precedent as a model for democratic resource governance
Advocate for investment treaty reform to protect sovereign Umwelt- decisions
Drängen auf ICSID (World Bank arbitration) reform on Umwelt- sovereignty
i: MiAmbiente — the environment ministry. ANAM (Autoridad Nacional del Ambiente) — Umweltbehörde. Panama's Supreme Court (Corte Suprema de Justicia) — ruled the Bergbau contract unconstitutional.
First Quantum Minerals — operated Cobre Panamá, one of the world's largest copper mines ($10B investment). The mine is in preservation and safe management mode following the court ruling.
Ministerio de Comercio e Industrias — oversees Bergbau concessions. Contraloría General de la República — the national audit office.

Asamblea Nacional de Panamá — unicameral, 71 members. Panama's Cobre Panamá case is a globally significant precedent for democratic control over extractive industries. First Quantum has filed an ICSID arbitration claim.

PE.s: Resource-rich Wirtschaft ($289.2B BIP) with Bergbau at 12.1% BIP (world's second-largest copper producer, major silver and gold). Landwirtschaft bei 7.3%. Dienstleistungen bei 51.3%. Social conflicts around Bergbau are frequent.

sectors.w: Peru's Bergbau sector generates over 200 active social conflicts (Defensoría del Pueblo tracks monthly). Wenn Umwelt- monitoring data is publicly linked to mine production revenue, W wird berechenbar.
bp: Prior consultation (consulta previa) enforcement per ILO Convention 169. Wenn indigenous communities can effectively negotiate Umwelt- conditions, das überlappende Interesse an extraction without consent wird geschwächt.
Mandatory pro Mine Umwelt- monitoring data published in real-time (OEFA already collects this). Public disclosure makes W computable.
Teilweise brechbar. Mining disturbs landscapes. But Peru's Bergbau Umwelt- standards have improved significantly — enforcement is the gap.
a: Melden an OEFA (Organismo de Evaluación y Fiscalización Ambiental)
Document community impacts — report to Defensoría del Pueblo
Report through Bergbau company compliance channels
Antamina, Cerro Verde, Las Bambas operators: Umsetzen community development agreements
Übernehmen international tailings standards (GISTM)
Publish pro Mine Umwelt- data
OEFA: Increase Umwelt- monitoring and enforcement
MINEM: Stärken Umwelt- conditions in Bergbau concessions
ANA (Autoridad Nacional del Agua): Durchsetzen water quality standards downstream of mines
Kontaktieren Sie Ihren Congresista in the Congreso de la República (130 members) um zu fordern enforcement of consulta previa and Umwelt- monitoring
Support ILO Convention 169 enforcement on indigenous consultation
Advocate for Escazú Agreement ratification
Drängen auf EITI enhanced reporting with Umwelt- data
i: OEFA — Peru's Umwelt- enforcement agency for the Bergbau sector, conducting inspections and imposing Sanktionen. Defensoría del Pueblo — the national ombudsman, publishes monthly social conflict reports. SENACE (Servicio Nacional de Certificación Ambiental) — conducts Umwelt- impact assessments.
Major mines: Antamina (BHP/Glencore), Cerro Verde (Freeport-McMoRan), Las Bambas (MMG/China Minmetals). SNMPE (Sociedad Nacional de Minería, Petróleo y Energía) — the industry association.
MINEM (Ministerio de Energía y Minas) — the energy and Bergbau ministry. ANA — the national water authority. EITI Peru — member since 2012.
Congreso de la República del Perú — unicameral, 130 members. Contact through congreso.gob.pe. Peru has ratified ILO Convention 169. Peru has not ratified the Escazú Agreement.

PG.s: Resource-rich Pacific island Wirtschaft ($31.8B BIP). Mining at 14.41% BIP, gas at 9.14% (PNG LNG). Landwirtschaft bei 16.4%. Extraordinary biodiversity (7% of world's species on 1% of land). Customary land ownership covers 97% of territory.

sectors.w: PNG's Bergbau sector (Ok Tedi, Porgera, Lihir) has a history of catastrophic Umwelt- damage. Ok Tedi mine discharged tailings directly into the Fly River system for decades. Environmental monitoring makes W computable.
bp: Mandatory Umwelt- bonds per IFC Performance Standards. Wenn remediation is pre-funded, überlappendes Interesse in low-cost disposal wird geschwächt.
Per-mine Umwelt- monitoring published alongside production revenue. PNG's EITI membership provides the framework. Macht W berechenbar.
Teilweise brechbar. Mining in tropical environments disturbs highly biodiverse ecosystems. But modern tailings management (not riverine disposal) can reduce Systemabhängigkeit.
a: Melden an CEPA (Conservation and Environment Protection Authority)
Document community impacts through local NGOs and customary landowner groups
Report through Barrick Gold/Newcrest compliance channels
Barrick Gold (Porgera), Newmont (Lihir), Ok Tedi Mining: Umsetzen international Umwelt- standards
Address legacy contamination
Übernehmen EITI enhanced reporting
MRA (Mineral Resources Authority): Stärken Umwelt- conditions in Bergbau leases
CEPA: Durchsetzen Umwelt- standards
EITI PNG: Expand to Umwelt- data

Support customary landowner rights in Bergbau negotiations
Eintreten über Pacific Islands Forum for regional Umwelt- standards
Drängen auf international accountability for Bergbau legacy contamination (Ok Tedi)
i: CEPA — PNG's Umweltbehörde. Department of Mineral Policy and Geohazards Management — Bergbau regulator. Note: PNG's governance capacity is limited outside major urban centers.
Ok Tedi Mining Limited — operates Ok Tedi copper-gold mine (now community-owned). Barrick Gold — Porgera gold mine. Newmont (formerly Newcrest) — Lihir gold mine. ExxonMobil — operates PNG LNG.
MRA — the Bergbau regulator. EITI PNG — member since 2014.
National Parliament of Papua New Guinea — unicameral, 111 members. PNG is a konstitutionelle Monarchie (King Charles III as head of state) with Westminster-style parlamentarisch Demokratie.

PH.s: Major Southeast Asian Wirtschaft ($461.6B BIP). Dienstleistungen bei 63.2% BIP. Landwirtschaft bei 9.1%. Mining at 1.52% (nickel — world's second-largest producer). Verarbeitendes Gewerbe bei 15.7% (electronics). Extreme climate vulnerability — typhoons.

sectors.w: Philippines' nickel Bergbau (for EV batteries) generates significant Umwelt- damage on small islands. Wenn pro Mine Umwelt- data is linked to nickel exports, W wird berechenbar.
bp: Environmental compliance as condition for Bergbau permits. President Duterte's 2017 Bergbau audit closed 28 mines. Sustained enforcement breaks das überlappende Interesse an non-compliant extraction.
Per-mine Umwelt- monitoring and community impact data. DENR already collects data — public disclosure makes W computable.
Teilweise brechbar. Mining on small islands with fragile ecosystems inherently causes significant damage. But modern methods can reduce impact.
a: Melden an DENR (Department of Environment and Natural Resources)
Document community impacts through Zivilgesellschaft organizations
Melden an Mines and Geosciences Bureau
Nickel Asia, Global Ferronickel: Umsetzen international Umwelt- standards
Übernehmen responsible Bergbau certification
Support community development agreements
DENR: Stärken Umwelt- monitoring and enforcement
MGB: Require Umwelt- bonds
EMB (Environmental Management Bureau): Durchsetzen pollution standards

Support Alternative Mining Bill with enhanced Umwelt- protections
Eintreten über ASEAN for regional Bergbau standards
Drängen auf EU Battery Regulation traceability for Philippine nickel
i: DENR — the environment and natural resources department. MGB (Mines and Geosciences Bureau) — manages Bergbau regulation. Philippines has relatively active Zivilgesellschaft and press freedom.
Nickel Asia Corporation — the country's largest nickel producer. Global Ferronickel Holdings. Philippines is the world's second-largest nickel producer.
EMB (Environmental Management Bureau) — under DENR, responsible for pollution control. Philippine Mining Act of 1995 — governs Bergbau operations.
Congress of the Philippines — bicameral: House of Representatives (316 members) and Senate (24 members). Contact through congress.gov.ph. Philippines is a presidential Demokratie.

PK.s: Large Wirtschaft ($371.6B BIP) with agriculture at 23.7% BIP (cotton, wheat, rice, sugarcane). Verarbeitendes Gewerbe bei 13.2%. Dienstleistungen bei 50.7%. Severe climate vulnerability (2022 floods caused $30B+ damage). Water stress. Coal at 0.12%, gas at 0.74%.

sectors.w: Pakistan's cotton-wheat-rice monoculture cycle depletes groundwater and degrades soil. Wenn per-district water table and soil health data is published alongside agricultural output, W wird berechenbar.
bp: Reformieren agricultural subsidies from input-based to outcome-based. Wenn farmers are rewarded for water efficiency rather than maximum extraction, das überlappende Interesse an water-intensive monoculture wird geschwächt.
Per-district groundwater monitoring and soil health data. WAPDA already monitors water — linking to agricultural output makes W computable.
Teilweise brechbar. Irrigated agriculture in semi-arid conditions inherently depletes water. But drip irrigation and crop diversification can reduce Systemabhängigkeit.

i: Pakistan EPA — federal Umweltbehörde. WAPDA — manages water resources and irrigation. Provincial EPAs — each province has its own Umwelt- agency.
Pakistan's agricultural sector is fragmented among smallholders. Major cotton buyers include Pakistani textile mills and international brands sourcing from Pakistan.

Ministry of National Food Security and Research — federal agricultural policy. IRSA — manages Indus water distribution among provinces. Pakistan Council of Research in Water Resources (PCRWR) — monitors groundwater.
Parliament of Pakistan — bicameral: National Assembly (342 members) and Senate (100 members). Contact through na.gov.pk. Pakistan is a federal parlamentarisch Demokratie.

PL.s: Major EU Wirtschaft ($917.8B BIP) with significant coal sector (0.25% rents but coal provides ~70% of electricity). Verarbeitendes Gewerbe bei 16.1% BIP. Dienstleistungen bei 59.1%. Coal transition is Poland's central climate challenge — 80,000+ miners.

sectors.w: Poland's coal sector is sustained by state subsidies and employment guarantees. EU ETS carbon pricing makes Polish coal uncompetitive. Wenn full carbon costs are internalized, the überlappendes Interesse between miners and state employment programs breaks.
bp: EU ETS alignment without free allowances. At €90/ton carbon, Polish coal electricity costs 2-3x renewable alternatives. The überlappendes Interesse breaks when coal plants cannot compete.
Per-plant Emissionen and health-impact disclosure. Poland's coal plants cause 4,000+ premature deaths/year. Making health costs visible per MWh makes W computable.
Nicht brechbar. Coal combustion releases CO₂ and air pollutants.

Support EU Just Transition Fund maximization for Silesia and other coal regions

i: GIOŚ (Główny Inspektorat Ochrony Środowiska) — the chief Umwelt- inspectorate. GIS (Główny Inspektorat Sanitarny) — the chief sanitary inspectorate monitoring public health. Poland transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2024.

PGE (Polska Grupa Energetyczna) — Poland's largest energy company. Tauron, Enea — other major energy companies. PGG (Polska Grupa Górnicza) — Poland's largest coal Bergbau company (staatliches, ~40,000 employees).

URE (Urząd Regulacji Energetyki) — the Energieregulierungsbehörde. NFEP (Narodowy Fundusz Ochrony Środowiska) — the Umwelt- fund financing green transition. Poland's coal phase-out agreement with Bergbau unions targets 2049.

Sejm (460 members) and Senat (100 members). Contact through sejm.gov.pl and senat.gov.pl. EU Just Transition Fund — Poland is the largest recipient of JTF funding. Poland's 2020 coal phase-out agreement targets closure of all coal mines by 2049.

PR.s: US unincorporated territory ($126B BIP) with pharmaceutical manufacturing (44.1% of BIP — among world's highest pharma concentration). Dienstleistungen bei 51.8%. Post-Hurricane Maria (2017) infrastructure challenges. LUMA Energy electricity crisis.

sectors.w: Puerto Rico has one of the highest obesity rates in the US. Imported UPF dominates the food supply (85%+ of food is imported). Wenn diet-related healthcare costs (Medicaid/Medicare data) are linked to product categories, W wird berechenbar.
bp: Reformieren food import tax structure to incentivize fresh food over UPF. Wenn imported UPF faces higher tariffs than fresh food, das überlappende Interesse an high-margin processed imports wird geschwächt.
CMS (Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services) data on Puerto Rico diet-related healthcare costs per product category. Macht W berechenbar.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. But Puerto Rico's tropical climate allows significant local food production to reduce import dependence.

i: FDA — the US Food and Drug Administration has jurisdiction in Puerto Rico. Puerto Rico Department of Health — oversees local food safety. US federal Hinweisgeber protections apply.
Major food retailers in Puerto Rico: Walmart, Econo. Empresas Fonalledas — local retail conglomerate.
PR Department of Agriculture — supports local agricultural development. Puerto Rico imports ~85% of food consumed.

Puerto Rico has a Resident Commissioner in the US House of Representatives (non-voting). Legislatura de Puerto Rico — bicameral: Cámara de Representantes (51 members) and Senado (27 members). As a US territory, many policy decisions are made at the federal level.

PS.s: Occupied territory ($13.7B BIP, severely constrained by occupation). Landwirtschaft bei 7.4% BIP. Dienstleistungen bei 76.2%. Economy dependent on Israeli work permits and international aid. Water access severely restricted. Active conflict zone.

sectors.w: Palestinian agriculture operates under severe water restrictions (Oslo II Accords limit Palestinian water extraction). Wenn water allocation data is published alongside agricultural output, the systemic welfare impact of occupation on agriculture becomes computable.
bp: International pressure for equitable water allocation per Oslo II renegotiation. Wenn Palestinian farmers access fair water shares, das überlappende Interesse an restricting agricultural development wird geschwächt.
Publication of per-community water allocation and agricultural productivity data. International monitoring (OCHA, World Bank) already collects data — systematic disclosure makes W computable.
Extreme Systemabhängigkeit. The occupation structurally constrains agricultural development through water restrictions, land access, and movement controls.

i: PWA (Palestinian Water Authority) — manages water resources under severe constraints. EQA (Environment Quality Authority) — the Palestinian Umweltbehörde. B'Tselem — Israeli human rights organization documenting occupation impacts.
Palestinian agricultural sector is predominantly smallholder. Olive oil is the most significant agricultural export. International NGOs and development agencies support agricultural development.

PWA — the key institution managing water allocation under occupation constraints. Joint Water Committee (JWC) — the Oslo-established mechanism for water cooperation between Israel and Palestine, widely criticized as inequitable.

Palestinian Legislative Council (PLC, 132 members) — non-functional since 2007. The Palestinian Authority operates through the executive. International channels: UNGA, UNHRC, ICJ Advisory Opinion on the Wall (2004), UN OCHA, UNRWA.

PT.s: EU Wirtschaft ($313.3B BIP). Dienstleistungen bei 66.3% BIP. Landwirtschaft bei 2% (cork, wine, olive oil). Verarbeitendes Gewerbe bei 11.8%. Renewable energy leader (70%+ of electricity from renewables). Successfully phased out coal (2021).

sectors.w: Portugal's SNS (Serviço Nacional de Saúde) tracks healthcare costs. Publishing diet-related costs per product category makes W computable.
bp: Umsetzen EU front-of-pack health labelling.
SNS diet-related healthcare cost data publication. Macht W berechenbar.
Not fully breakable. Reformierenulation mandates reduce Systemabhängigkeit.

i: ASAE (Autoridade de Segurança Alimentar e Económica) — food safety and economic inspection. Lei 93/2021 — Portugal's Hinweisgeber protection law.
Jerónimo Martins (Pingo Doce) — major Portuguese retailer. FIPA (Federação das Indústrias Portuguesas Agro-Alimentares) — food industry federation.
DGS (Direção-Geral da Saúde) — public health authority. SNS — the national health service.
Assembleia da República — unicameral, 230 members. Contact through parlamento.pt. Portugal is a parlamentarisch Demokratie.

PY.s: Landlocked South American Wirtschaft ($44.5B BIP). Landwirtschaft bei 10.7% BIP (massive soy production — 4th largest exporter globally). Verarbeitendes Gewerbe bei 19% BIP. Dienstleistungen bei 48.7%. Itaipú Dam provides 90%+ renewable electricity. Severe Entwaldung from soy expansion.

sectors.w: Paraguay's soy monoculture has destroyed 90%+ of Atlantic Forest and drives ongoing Chaco Entwaldung. Wenn per-farm Entwaldung and Bodendegradation data is linked to soy exports, W wird berechenbar.
bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-Entwaldung soy. Wenn EU buyers require verified Entwaldung-free origin, das überlappende Interesse an Chaco clearing for soy breaks.
Satellite-based Entwaldung monitoring linked to soy export data. Global Forest Watch already tracks Paraguay extensively — linking to farm-level data makes W computable.
Teilweise brechbar. Soy monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. But no-till farming and cover cropping can reduce Bodendegradation.

i: SEAM (Secretaría del Ambiente) — now MADES (Ministerio del Ambiente y Desarrollo Sostenible). INFONA (Instituto Forestal Nacional) — the forest management authority. INDI — the indigenous affairs institute.
Major soy traders operating in Paraguay: Cargill, Bunge, ADM, Louis Dreyfus. CAPPRO (Cámara Paraguaya de Procesadores de Oleaginosas y Cereales) — the oilseed processors' association.
MADES — environment ministry. Zero Deforestation Law (Ley 2524/2004) — prohibits conversion of forest to agriculture in the Eastern Region (but not the Chaco, where Entwaldung continues).
Congreso Nacional del Paraguay — bicameral: Cámara de Diputados (80 members) and Cámara de Senadores (45 members). Paraguay is a presidential republic.

QA.s: Hydrocarbon-dominated Wirtschaft ($219.2B BIP). Industrie bei 58.2% BIP. Ölrenten 15.28% BIP, gas rents 12.01% BIP — world's largest LNG exporter. Dienstleistungen bei 46.1%. Highest per-capita CO₂ Emissionen globally. Absolute monarchy.

sectors.w: Qatar's LNG dominance faces demand erosion as importing nations (Japan, South Korea, EU) diversify toward renewables and hydrogen. Wenn importers reduce LNG dependence, the überlappendes Interesse wird geschwächt.
bp: Importer diversification away from Qatari LNG. As Japan, Korea, and Europe invest in renewables and green hydrogen, das überlappende Interesse an fossil gas dependence wird geschwächt.
Per-field Emissionen and flaring data disclosure. Qatar Energy already publishes aggregate sustainability data — extending to field-level reporting makes W computable.
Nicht brechbar. LNG combustion releases CO₂. Carbon capture on LNG (pre-combustion at liquefaction) captures only a fraction of lifecycle Emissionen.

i: QatarEnergy (formerly Qatar Petroleum) — the state hydrocarbon company controlling all oil and gas operations. International partners operate under production-sharing agreements.
QatarEnergy — staatliches, operates the world's largest LNG facility at Ras Laffan Industrial City. North Field — the world's largest non-associated gas field.
Ministry of Environment and Climate Change — Umwelt- regulator. KAHRAMAA — electricity and water utility. Qatar National Vision 2030 — the national strategic framework.

Qatar is an absolute monarchy — the Emir governs by decree. Advisory Shura Council (45 members, 30 elected since 2021) has limited legislative power. International channels: GCC, OPEC (Qatar withdrew 2019 but re-engaged), COP process.

RO.s: EU-Mitglied Wirtschaft ($382.6B BIP). Verarbeitendes Gewerbe bei 13.2% BIP. Gasrenten 0.53%, oil 0.38%. Dienstleistungen bei 62.6%. Significant forestry issues — illegal logging in old-growth Carpathian forests despite EU-Mitgliedship.

sectors.w: Romania's large-scale agricultural land consolidation has created monoculture on former smallholdings. Wenn soil health data is linked to EU CAP payments, W wird berechenbar.
bp: EU CAP eco-scheme conditionality. Wenn subsidy payments depend on crop rotation and soil health metrics, das überlappende Interesse an exhaustive monoculture wird geschwächt.
Per-farm soil health monitoring through APIA (Agency for Payments and Intervention in Agriculture). Macht W berechenbar.
Teilweise brechbar. Grain monoculture degrades Romania's fertile black-earth soils. Cover cropping and crop rotation reduce Systemabhängigkeit.

i: Garda Forestieră — Romania's forest guard, responsible for enforcing the Forest Code. Inspectoratul de Stat pentru Controlul în Silvicultură — state forestry inspectorate. Agent Green — Romanian Umwelt- NGO documenting illegal logging.
Romania has significant foreign-owned agricultural land. HS Timber (formerly Holzindustrie Schweighofer) — major timber processor, previously linked to illegal logging controversies.
APIA (Agenția de Plăți și Intervenție pentru Agricultură) — manages EU CAP payments. ANPM — Umwelt- protection agency. Ministry of Environment, Waters and Forests.
Parlamentul României — bicameral: Camera Deputaților (330 members) and Senat (136 members). EU-Mitglied since 2007. Contact through cdep.ro and senat.ro.

RS.s: Western Balkan Wirtschaft ($90.1B BIP). Verarbeitendes Gewerbe bei 12.7%. Kohlerenten 0.24% BIP — but coal supplies ~70% of electricity. EU-Kandidat country. Mining sector growing (Rio Tinto lithium project controversy).

sectors.w: Serbia's lignite dependence (Nikola Tesla power plants — among Europe's worst SO₂ emitters) faces EU accession conditionality. EU ETS alignment will make lignite uncompetitive.
bp: EU accession requiring LCPD/IED compliance. Retrofitting Nikola Tesla A and B to meet EU emission limits costs more than replacement with renewables.
Per-plant Emissionen and health cost data. HEAL (Health and Environment Alliance) has documented thousands of premature deaths. Macht W berechenbar.
Nicht brechbar. Lignite combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and mercury.

i: Ministry of Environmental Protection — Umweltbehörde. CEKOR — Serbian Umwelt- NGO. RES Foundation — erneuerbare Energie advocacy.
EPS (Elektroprivreda Srbije) — state electricity utility operating Nikola Tesla A (1650 MW) and B (1240 MW) lignite plants. Kolubara Bergbau basin — supplies lignite to these plants.
AERS (Agencija za energetiku Republike Srbije) — Energieregulierungsbehörde. Serbia is an Energy Community Treaty member, requiring alignment with EU energy acquis.
Narodna skupština (National Assembly) — unicameral, 250 members. EU-Kandidat country since 2012. Energy Community Treaty member.

RU.s: Major hydrocarbon Wirtschaft ($2,173.8B BIP). Ölrenten 9.67%, gas rents 5.86%, coal 0.61%, Bergbau 2.05% BIP. World's largest gas exporter, second-largest oil exporter. Militärausgaben 7.05% BIP. Authoritarian governance under international Sanktionen since 2022.

sectors.w: Russia's oil and gas revenues have been severely constrained by Western Sanktionen and price caps since 2022. Buyer diversification (EU pivot away from Russian gas) is actively breaking the überlappendes Interesse.
bp: Buyer diversification already underway. EU reduced Russian gas imports from ~40% to ~15% of supply. Wenn importers eliminate dependence, das überlappende Interesse an Russian fossil fuels breaks.
Sanctions-enforced Transparenz — G7 price cap mechanism requires attestation of pricing. This partially makes W computable, though enforcement gaps remain.
Nicht brechbar. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ regardless of source.

Gazprom — state gas monopoly. Rosneft — state oil company. Most Western majors (Shell, BP, ExxonMobil) have exited Russian operations since 2022.
G7 Russian Oil Price Cap Coalition — enforces $60/barrel cap through insurance and shipping services. EU Sanktionen packages (14+ rounds). OFAC (US), OFSI (UK) — Sanktionen enforcement.

Note: Russia's Federal Assembly (Federalnoye Sobraniye — State Duma 450 members, Federation Council 170 members) does not function as an independent legislature. International channels: G7/G20 (Russia suspended from G8), UN General Assembly, international Sanktionen coalitions.

RW.s: Small East African Wirtschaft ($14.3B BIP). Landwirtschaft bei 24.6% BIP. Forstrenten 3.97%. Dienstleistungen bei 47.6%. Remarkable post-genocide development but autoritär governance. Strong Umwelt- policy (plastic bag ban pioneer).

sectors.w: Rwanda's hillside agriculture on steep terrain causes erosion and Bodendegradation. Wenn soil erosion data is linked to agricultural output per district, W wird berechenbar.
bp: Terracing and agroforestry expansion. Rwanda already has extensive terracing programs — extending to all cultivated hillsides with measurable soil retention targets breaks the überlappendes Interesse.
Per-district soil erosion monitoring linked to agricultural productivity data. Rwanda's strong data infrastructure supports this. Macht W berechenbar.
Teilweise brechbar. Hillside cultivation on steep slopes inherently risks erosion. Terracing and contour farming reduce but cannot eliminate Systemabhängigkeit.

i: REMA — the Umwelt- management authority. RAB — agricultural research and extension. Rwanda has strong institutional capacity relative to income level.
NAEB — manages agricultural export promotion (coffee, tea, pyrethrum). Rwanda's agricultural sector is organized through cooperatives and imihigo (performance contracts).
MINAGRI — agriculture ministry. RLMUA — land use authority. Rwanda's Vision 2050 includes Umwelt- sustainability targets.

Inteko Ishinga Amategeko (Parliament) — bicameral: Chamber of Deputies (80 members) and Senate (26 members). Note: Rwanda is effectively a one-party dominant state under RPF (Rwandan Patriotic Front). International channels: EAC (East African Community), AU, ICGLR.

SD.s: Conflict-affected Wirtschaft ($49.7B BIP). Landwirtschaft bei 22.2% BIP. Mining 6.63% (gold). Ölrenten 3.3% (reduced after South Sudan's independence). Civil war since April 2023 between SAF and RSF. Humanitarian catastrophe.

sectors.w: Sudan's artisanal gold Bergbau uses mercury extensively and generates revenue streams funding armed groups. Wenn gold revenue flows are traced, W wird berechenbar.
bp: International supply chain due diligence blocking conflict gold. Wenn refiners verify provenance, the überlappendes Interesse between armed groups and gold revenues wird geschwächt.
Tracing gold flows from artisanal mines to international markets. LBMA (London Bullion Market Association) responsible sourcing standards provide the framework. Macht W berechenbar.
Teilweise brechbar. Artisanal Bergbau uses mercury (Minamata Convention violation). Mercury-free processing methods exist but require investment.

i: Note: Sudan is in active civil war. No functioning domestic oversight exists. UN Panel of Experts — monitors Sanktionen and conflict dynamics. IPIS (International Peace Information Service) — tracks artisanal Bergbau and conflict resources.
Sudan's gold primarily flows through UAE (Dubai) trading hubs. LBMA — sets responsible sourcing standards for gold refiners worldwide.
LBMA — London Bullion Market Association, responsible sourcing standard-setter. FATF (Financial Action Task Force) — can designate jurisdictions for gold laundering risks.

Note: Sudan's transitional government collapsed with the April 2023 war. No functioning legislature. International channels: UN Security Council, AU (African Union Peace and Security Council), IGAD (Intergovernmental Authority on Entwickelnment).

SE.s: Advanced Nordic Wirtschaft ($603.7B BIP). Verarbeitendes Gewerbe bei 13% BIP. Mining 1% BIP (iron ore — LKAB is Europe's largest). Dienstleistungen bei 66.4%. Strong Umwelt- regulations. EU-Mitglied. Leading in green steel transition (HYBRIT).

sectors.w: Sweden's iron ore Bergbau (LKAB) in northern Sweden affects Sami reindeer herding land and generates tailings. Wenn pro Mine Umwelt- and indigenous impact data is published alongside production, W wird berechenbar.
bp: Full internalization of indigenous land-use costs and Umwelt- remediation. Wenn LKAB pays for herding disruption and tailings management, das überlappende Interesse an low-cost extraction wird geschwächt.
Per-mine Umwelt- disclosure including impacts on Sami land use. LKAB publishes sustainability reports — extending to independently verified indigenous impact assessments makes W computable.

Teilweise brechbar. HYBRIT (Hydrogen Breakthrough Ironmaking Technology) — SSAB/LKAB/Vattenfall joint venture — is producing fossil-free steel, demonstrating that Bergbau's downstream Systemabhängigkeit on carbon-intensive processing can be broken.

Mark- och miljödomstolarna (Land and Environment Courts): Apply rigorous Umwelt- review
SGU: Integrate indigenous land-use data into Bergbau assessments
Kontaktieren Sie Ihren Riksdagsledamot in the Riksdag (349 members) um zu fordern indigenous consent requirements in Bergbau permits
Eintreten über EU Critical Raw Materials Act for Umwelt- and indigenous rights safeguards
Support Nordic Council cooperation on Sami rights across borders
Drängen auf EU taxonomy alignment of Bergbau Umwelt- standards
i: Naturvårdsverket — Umwelt- protection agency. Bergsstaten — the Bergbau inspectorate, part of SGU (Sveriges geologiska undersökning — Geological Survey of Sweden). Sametinget — the Sami Parliament, representing indigenous Sami rights.

LKAB — staatliches iron ore company, Europe's largest. SSAB — steel producer, partner in HYBRIT. Boliden — base metals Bergbau and smelting company. HYBRIT — world's first fossil-free steel initiative.
Mark- och miljödomstolarna — specialized Umwelt- courts. Sweden's Minerals Act (Minerallagen) governs Bergbau permits.
Riksdag — unicameral parliament, 349 members. Contact through riksdagen.se. Sweden is a konstitutionelle Monarchie and EU-Mitglied.

SG.s: Advanced city-state Wirtschaft ($547.4B BIP). Dienstleistungen bei 73% BIP. Verarbeitendes Gewerbe bei 16.3% (electronics, petrochemicals). No natural resources. Major petrochemical refining hub and global financial center. World's busiest transshipment port.

sectors.w: Singapore is a major petrochemical refining and trading hub — the 'Houston of Asia.' Wenn refinery Emissionen and fossil fuel trading flows are disclosed per facility, W wird berechenbar.
bp: Carbon tax escalation (Singapore's CO₂-Steuer rises to S$25/tCO₂ in 2024, S$45 in 2026, S$50-80 by 2030). Wenn refining margins incorporate carbon costs, das überlappende Interesse an unpriced Emissionen wird geschwächt.
Per-refinery Emissionen and trade-flow disclosure. MAS (Monetary Authority of Singapore) climate disclosure requirements extend to financial flows. Macht W berechenbar.
Teilweise brechbar. Petrochemical refining inherently emits. However, Singapore's investment in sustainable aviation fuel and green hydrogen can reduce Systemabhängigkeit over time.
a: Melden an NEA (National Environment Agency)
Report through MAS Hinweisgeber channels for financial misconduct
Dokumentieren über SGX (Singapore Exchange) disclosure requirements
Shell, ExxonMobil (Jurong Island): Umsetzen carbon capture at refineries
Banks (DBS, OCBC, UOB): Apply coal financing phase-out policies
Petrochemical companies: Investieren in green hydrogen and sustainable feedstocks
NEA: Accelerate CO₂-Steuer escalation timeline
MAS: Stärken climate-related financial disclosure (TCFD alignment)
EMA (Energy Market Authority): Mandate erneuerbare Energie targets
Engage through available parlamentarisch channels — Members of Parliament (93 elected, up to 12 non-constituency/nominated)
Support ASEAN Umwelt- cooperation frameworks
Eintreten über Singapore's Green Finance Action Plan for regional decarbonization
Drängen auf IMO shipping Emissionen standards (Singapore is world's largest bunkering port)
i: NEA (National Environment Agency) — Umwelt- regulator. MAS (Monetary Authority of Singapore) — financial regulator with expanding climate disclosure mandate. SGX — Singapore Exchange, requires climate reporting.
Jurong Island — Singapore's petrochemical hub hosting Shell, ExxonMobil, and other major refineries. DBS, OCBC, UOB — Singapore's three major banks with significant fossil fuel financing exposure.
EMA (Energy Market Authority) — Energieregulierungsbehörde. Singapore Green Plan 2030 — national sustainability framework. Carbon tax administered by NEA under Carbon Pricing Act.

Parliament of Singapore — unicameral. Singapore is a parlamentarisch republic with dominant-party governance (PAP — People's Action Party). Note: limited political pluralism in practice. International channels: ASEAN (founding member), IMO, UNFCCC.

SI.s: Small EU-Mitglied Wirtschaft ($73B BIP). Verarbeitendes Gewerbe bei 19.4% BIP. Dienstleistungen bei 57.9%. Significant forest cover (60%+ of territory). EU-Mitglied since 2004. Former Yugoslav republic with strong Umwelt- awareness.

sectors.w: Slovenia's intensive agriculture in lowland areas (Pomurje, Podravje) relies on monoculture grain and livestock. Wenn soil and water quality data is linked to CAP payments, W wird berechenbar.
bp: EU CAP eco-scheme implementation. Wenn subsidy payments require biodiversity and soil health measures, das überlappende Interesse an exhaustive monoculture wird geschwächt.
Per-farm soil and water quality monitoring through ARSKTRP (Agency for Agricultural Markets and Rural Entwickelnment). Macht W berechenbar.

Teilweise brechbar. Grain monoculture and intensive livestock farming degrade soil and pollute groundwater. Organic farming and crop rotation reduce dependence — Slovenia already has 11%+ organic farming share.
a: Melden an ARSO (Agencija Republike Slovenije za okolje — Environment Agency)
Melden an Inšpektorat za kmetijstvo (Agricultural Inspectorate)

Agricultural cooperatives: Übernehmen organic and integrated farming practices
Dairy industry: Umsetzen manure management standards
Food processors: Source from diversified farming operations
Ministry of Agriculture: Stärken CAP eco-scheme implementation
ARSO: Durchsetzen nitrate directive compliance
ARSKTRP: Condition payments on biodiversity measures
Kontaktieren Sie Ihren Poslanec in the Državni zbor (90 members) um zu fordern stronger CAP eco-scheme implementation
Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy implementation
Eintreten über Alpine Convention for sustainable mountain agriculture
i: ARSO — the Environment Agency of Slovenia. Umanotera — Slovenian Foundation for Sustainable Entwickelnment. Focus — Umwelt- NGO.
Slovenia's agricultural sector is dominated by small family farms (average 7 hectares). Kmetijsko gozdarska zbornica (Chamber of Agriculture and Forestry) — industry association.
ARSKTRP (Agencija za kmetijske trge in razvoj podeželja) — manages CAP payments. Ministry of Agriculture, Forestry and Food — policy ministry.
Državni zbor (National Assembly) — 90 members. Državni svet (National Council) — 40 members, advisory role. EU-Mitglied since 2004. Alpine Convention member. Contact through dz-rs.si.

SK.s: Central European EU-Mitglied ($140.9B BIP). Verarbeitendes Gewerbe bei 16.3% BIP — heavily auto-dependent (Volkswagen, Kia, Stellantis). Dienstleistungen bei 60%. EU-Mitglied since 2004. World's largest per-capita car producer.

sectors.w: Slovakia's food processing industry produces significant ultra-processed food for regional markets. Wenn per-product health impact data (obesity, diabetes correlations) is disclosed alongside marketing spend, W wird berechenbar.
bp: EU front-of-pack labeling (Nutri-Score or equivalent). Wenn consumers can identify ultra-processing, das überlappende Interesse an opaque ingredient lists wird geschwächt.
Mandatory per-product health impact disclosure. Slovakia has rising obesity rates (20%+). Linking UPF consumption data to health outcomes makes W computable.
Nicht brechbar. Ultra-processing by definition strips nutritional value and adds synthetic additives.
a: Melden an ŠVPS (Štátna veterinárna a potravinová správa — State Veterinary and Food Administration)
Melden an ÚVZ SR (Úrad verejného zdravotníctva — Public Health Authority)

i: ŠVPS — the food safety authority. ÚVZ SR — public health authority monitoring dietary health outcomes.
Slovakia's food retail is dominated by international chains (Lidl, Kaufland, Tesco, Billa). Slovenská poľnohospodárska a potravinárska komora — food industry chamber.
Ministry of Health — oversees dietary health policy. Ministry of Agriculture and Rural Entwickelnment — food production policy.
Národná rada Slovenskej republiky (National Council) — unicameral, 150 members. EU-Mitglied since 2004. Contact through nrsr.sk.

SN.s: West African Wirtschaft ($32.8B BIP). Landwirtschaft bei 16.6% BIP. Mining 2.9% (phosphates, gold, zircon). Offshore oil and gas discoveries (Sangomar field — first oil expected). Fischerei crucial for food security. Democracy with peaceful power transitions.

sectors.w: Senegal's fisheries face severe Überfischung by foreign industrial fleets (EU, China) competing with artisanal pirogues. Wenn per-vessel catch data is published alongside stock assessments, W wird berechenbar.
bp: Reformieren fishing access agreements to limit foreign industrial fleet catch. Wenn EU and Chinese DWF (Distant Water Fleet) quotas reflect stock sustainability, das überlappende Interesse an Überfischung wird geschwächt.
VMS (Vessel Monitoring System) data publication and per-vessel catch reporting. Senegal has invested in MCS (Monitoring, Control and Surveillance). Macht W berechenbar.
Teilweise brechbar. Industrial trawling damages benthic habitats. Artisanal fishing with selective gear reduces Systemabhängigkeit.
a: Melden an DPSP (Direction de la Protection et de la Surveillance des Pêches)
Dokumentieren über ICSF (International Collective in Support of Fishworkers)
Report IUU (Illegal, Unreported, Unregulated) fishing to CNSP (Centre National de Surveillance des Pêches)
Foreign fishing companies: Comply with Senegalese fishing access terms
Fish processing companies: Übernehmen sustainable sourcing certification (MSC)
Artisanal fishing cooperatives: Support co-management of nearshore zones
Ministry of Fischerei: Reformieren fishing access agreements with EU and China
CRODT (Centre de Recherches Océanographiques de Dakar-Thiaroye): Publish stock assessments
CSRP (Sub-Regional Fischerei Commission): Coordinate regional management

Support CSRP regional fisheries management plans
Eintreten über AU-IBAR for African fisheries sovereignty
Drängen auf RFMO (Regional Fischerei Management Organization) quotas reflecting stock sustainability
i: DPSP — fisheries protection directorate. CNSP — national fisheries surveillance center, operates patrol vessels. Senegal has one of West Africa's most developed fisheries monitoring systems.
Senegal's fisheries employ ~600,000 people. Artisanal pirogues (wooden boats) land ~80% of total catch. GAIPES — fish exporters association.
Ministry of Fischerei and Maritime Economy. CRODT — oceanographic research center providing stock assessments. CSRP — sub-regional fisheries commission for West Africa.

Assemblée nationale du Sénégal — unicameral, 165 members. Senegal is a presidential republic with a strong democratic tradition (peaceful power transitions in 2000, 2012, 2024). Contact through assemblee-nationale.sn.

SO.s: Fragile state ($12B BIP). Limited economic data available. Forstrenten 11.24% BIP (charcoal — major Entwaldung driver). Charcoal trade linked to Al-Shabaab financing. Ongoing conflict and state fragility.

sectors.w: Somalia's charcoal production devastates acacia forests and finances armed groups. Wenn charcoal trade flows are traced and linked to Entwaldung data, W wird berechenbar.
bp: UN Security Council charcoal export ban enforcement (Resolution 2036). Wenn the ban is effectively enforced, the überlappendes Interesse between Al-Shabaab revenue and charcoal trade wird geschwächt.
Satellite Entwaldung monitoring linked to charcoal trade routes. UN Monitoring Group has documented the flows. Macht W berechenbar.
Nicht brechbar. Charcoal production from slow-growing acacia in arid Somali climate causes irreversible desertification.
a: Melden an UN Monitoring Group on Somalia and Eritrea
Dokumentieren über Somali Umwelt- organizations where operational
Report charcoal shipments to naval forces (EU NAVFOR, Combined Maritime Forces)
Shipping companies: Screen for Somali charcoal cargoes

Federal Government of Somalia: Durchsetzen charcoal export ban

UN SEMG: Stärken monitoring of charcoal trade networks
