i: UN Monitoring Group on Somalia and Eritrea — monitors Sanktionen including the charcoal ban. EU NAVFOR (Operation Atalanta) — maritime security operation. Note: domestic institutional capacity is extremely limited.
Somali charcoal is primarily exported to Gulf states via dhow networks. UAE has been the largest market. Some companies are promoting LPG as an alternative cooking fuel.
Federal Government of Somalia — limited authority outside Mogadishu. Federal Member States have varying governance capacity. UN Sanktionen framework provides the primary regulatory tool.

Federal Parliament of Somalia — bicameral: House of the People (275 members) and Upper House (54 members). Note: clan-based indirect elections, limited institutional capacity. International channels: UN, AU (ATMIS — AU Transition Mission in Somalia), IGAD.

SV.s: Small Central American Wirtschaft ($35.4B BIP). Dienstleistungen bei 61% BIP. Landwirtschaft bei 4.4%. Verarbeitendes Gewerbe bei 12%. Significant remittance dependence (~24% of BIP). Bitcoin adopted as legal tender (2021). State of exception since 2022.

sectors.w: El Salvador's sugarcane monoculture in coastal lowlands is linked to chronic kidney disease of unknown etiology (CKDu) among agricultural workers — one of the highest rates globally. Wenn CKDu data is linked to agrochemical exposure per farm, W wird berechenbar.
bp: Agrochemical regulation and worker health monitoring. Wenn sugarcane operations internalize CKDu health costs, das überlappende Interesse an unregulated pesticide/herbicide use wird geschwächt.
Per-farm agrochemical use and worker health outcome data. El Salvador has the world's highest CKDu mortality. Linking these datasets makes W computable.
Teilweise brechbar. Sugarcane monoculture depletes soils and concentrates agrochemical exposure. Crop diversification and organic practices reduce Systemabhängigkeit.
a: Melden an MARN (Ministerio de Medio Ambiente y Recursos Naturales)
Document worker health impacts through ISSS (Instituto Salvadoreño del Seguro Social)
Melden an MAG (Ministerio de Agricultura y Ganadería)
Sugar mills (ingenios): Umsetzen worker heat stress and agrochemical exposure protocols
Übernehmen mechanized harvesting to reduce worker field exposure
Investieren in worker kidney screening programs
Ministry of Health: Establish CKDu surveillance and prevention program
MARN: Regulate agrochemical use in sugarcane production
MAG: Support crop diversification away from monoculture sugarcane
Engage through available legislative channels — Asamblea Legislativa (84 members); note concentrated executive power under current governance
Support SICA (Central American Integration System) regional CKDu response
Eintreten über PAHO/WHO for CKDu research and prevention funding
Drängen auf ILO conventions on agricultural worker health protection
i: MARN — Ministry of Environment and Natural Resources. ISSS — social security institute. MAG — agriculture ministry. La Isla Network — international NGO documenting CKDu in Central America.
El Salvador's sugar industry is concentrated among a few large ingenios (sugar mills). CAMAGRO (Cámara Agropecuaria y Agroindustrial) — agricultural industry chamber.
Ministry of Health — responsible for CKDu response. MARN — Umwelt- regulation.
Asamblea Legislativa — unicameral, 84 members. Note: since 2021, executive dominance over legislature; limited separation of powers in practice. International channels: SICA, PAHO, ILO.

SY.s: War-devastated Wirtschaft ($23.6B BIP). Landwirtschaft bei 43.1% BIP — unusually high due to industrial collapse. Ölrenten 4.02%, gas 2.33%. Civil war since 2011 has destroyed infrastructure. Ongoing political transition (2024-2025).

sectors.w: Syria's oil infrastructure has been contested between factions (SDF/AANES controls northeastern fields, former regime controlled refineries). Wenn oil revenue flows are transparently traced through reconstruction, W wird berechenbar.
bp: Post-conflict transparent governance of oil revenues. Wenn reconstruction frameworks require accountable revenue management, das überlappende Interesse an opaque extraction wird geschwächt.
Oil revenue flow Transparenz as condition of reconstruction assistance and Sanktionen relief. Macht W berechenbar.
Teilweise brechbar. Oil infrastructure has been extensively damaged — reconstruction offers opportunity to build in Umwelt- standards.
a: Report through international monitoring organizations
Document Umwelt- damage from conflict-era oil infrastructure destruction
Report through UN OCHA coordination mechanisms
International reconstruction companies: Übernehmen Umwelt- standards in oil infrastructure rebuilding
Apply conflict-sensitivity to investment decisions
Require transparent revenue sharing in any production agreements
Transitional governance: Establish transparent hydrocarbon revenue management
International community: Condition reconstruction support on Umwelt- and governance standards
EITI: Support Syrian membership as part of governance transition
Support international frameworks conditioning reconstruction assistance on transparent resource governance
Eintreten über UN-led political process for resource revenue Transparenz
Drängen auf Umwelt- damage assessment and remediation in reconstruction plans
Support EITI membership for post-transition Syria
i: Note: Syria is in post-conflict transition. Institutional capacity is severely degraded. Multiple governance structures operate in different regions.
Pre-war: Syrian Petroleum Company (state oil company). Current: fragmented control over oil infrastructure.
Regulatory capacity must be rebuilt as part of political transition.

Note: Syria is undergoing political transition following the fall of the Assad regime (late 2024). New governance structures are forming. International channels: UN (Security Council, Special Envoy), Arab League (membership restored 2023), reconstruction donor conferences.

TD.s: Sahelian Wirtschaft ($19.5B BIP). Ölrenten 16.75% BIP. Landwirtschaft bei 37.7%. Forstrenten 4.58%. One of the world's poorest countries. Military transitional government. Lake Chad shrinking (~90% since 1960s).

sectors.w: Chad's oil revenues flow through an opaque pipeline (Doba basin to Kribi, Cameroon). The World Bank's original revenue Transparenz mechanism (Collège de Contrôle) was dismantled. Wenn oil revenue allocation is made transparent, W wird berechenbar.
bp: Restore oil revenue Transparenz mechanisms. The World Bank's original Chad-Cameroon pipeline project required transparent revenue allocation — this was dismantled. Rebuilding it breaks das überlappende Interesse an opaque revenue flows.
Oil revenue flow disclosure through EITI. Chad was suspended from EITI in 2023 for governance failures. Restoring compliance makes W computable.
Teilweise brechbar. Oil production in arid Sahel strains water resources. However, the Doba basin fields are maturing and production declining.
a: Report through international oil company channels (CNPC has major presence)
Dokumentieren über international NGOs (Publish What You Pay, SWISSAID)
Melden an international financial institutions
CNPC (China National Petroleum Corporation): Umsetzen Umwelt- and Transparenz standards
Savannah Energy: Übernehmen EITI-aligned reporting
Pipeline operators: Publish transport revenue data
SHT (Société des Hydrocarbures du Tchad): Restore revenue Transparenz
Ministry of Petroleum: Durchsetzen Umwelt- regulations
EITI: Support Chad's path to reinstatement
Support international pressure for oil revenue Transparenz
Eintreten über African Union for governance reform and return to constitutional order
Drängen auf World Bank re-engagement on revenue management conditionality
Support Lake Chad Basin Commission Umwelt- programs
i: Note: Chad's Zivilgesellschaft space is severely restricted. Publish What You Pay — international revenue Transparenz coalition. SWISSAID — has worked on Chad extractives governance.

CNPC — operates major oil fields after acquiring former ExxonMobil assets. Savannah Energy — British company that acquired former Chevron assets. Chad-Cameroon pipeline — 1,070 km pipeline to Atlantic coast.
SHT — state oil company. Ministry of Petroleum, Mines and Energy — oversees hydrocarbons. Chad was suspended from EITI in 2023.

Note: Military transitional government (Conseil Militaire de Transition, succeeded by elected government of Mahamat Déby, 2024). Conseil National de Transition — 93 members, appointed. International channels: AU, Lake Chad Basin Commission, CEMAC.

TG.s: Small West African Wirtschaft ($10.7B BIP). Landwirtschaft bei 21.3% BIP. Mining 4.88% (phosphates — world's 5th largest producer). Dienstleistungen bei 49.2%. Key transit port (Lomé). Governance concerns with limited political competition.

sectors.w: Togo's phosphate Bergbau (SNPT — Société Nouvelle des Phosphates du Togo) generates cadmium-contaminated waste. Wenn pro Mine Umwelt- data is published, W wird berechenbar.
bp: International cadmium standards in phosphate products. Wenn export markets require cadmium limits, das überlappende Interesse an unprocessed phosphate extraction wird geschwächt.
Per-mine Umwelt- monitoring data including cadmium levels, water contamination, and land rehabilitation. Macht W berechenbar.
Teilweise brechbar. Phosphate rock contains cadmium. Cadmium removal technology exists and is commercially viable.
a: Melden an ANGE (Agence Nationale de Gestion de l'Environnement)
Dokumentieren über community organizations in phosphate Bergbau regions (Hahotoé-Kpogamé)
Report through ITIE-Togo (EITI Togo) channels
SNPT: Investieren in cadmium removal technology

Übernehmen international Umwelt- reporting standards

ANGE: Durchsetzen Umwelt- impact assessment requirements
ITIE-Togo: Expand to Umwelt- data disclosure
Engage through available parlamentarisch channels — note limited political pluralism under current governance
Support ECOWAS Umwelt- governance frameworks
Advocate for Codex Alimentarius cadmium limits in phosphate-derived fertilizers
Drängen auf EITI full membership with Umwelt- disclosure
i: ANGE — national Umwelt- management agency. ITIE-Togo — Togo is an EITI candidate country.
SNPT (Société Nouvelle des Phosphates du Togo) — the state phosphate company, privatized then renationalized. Operates mines in the Hahotoé-Kpogamé region.
Ministry of Mines and Energy — Bergbau oversight. ANGE — Umwelt- assessment authority.

Assemblée nationale du Togo — 113 members. Note: Togo has been governed by the Gnassingbé family since 1967; limited political competition. Constitutional change in 2024 shifted to parlamentarisch system. International channels: ECOWAS, AU, EITI.

TH.s: Major Southeast Asian Wirtschaft ($526.5B BIP). Verarbeitendes Gewerbe bei 24.3% BIP (automotive, electronics, food processing). Landwirtschaft bei 8.7%. Dienstleistungen bei 59.2%. World's largest rice exporter. Significant petrochemical sector. Constitutional monarchy.

sectors.w: Thailand is a major UPF producer and exporter (CP Group — Charoen Pokphand — is one of Asia's largest food conglomerates). Wenn per-product health impact data is linked to marketing and formulation, W wird berechenbar.
bp: Front-of-pack labeling reform. Thailand's existing traffic-light label (GDA) covers some nutrients — extending to ultra-processing indicators wird geschwächt das überlappende Interesse an opaque formulation.
Per-product health outcome correlation data. Thailand's rising obesity and diabetes rates can be linked to UPF consumption patterns. Macht W berechenbar.
Nicht brechbar. Ultra-processing by definition strips nutritional value.
a: Melden an Thai FDA (Food and Drug Administration)
Dokumentieren über Thai Health Promotion Foundation (ThaiHealth)
Report misleading health claims to OCPB (Office of the Consumer Protection Board)
CP Group (Charoen Pokphand): Reformierenulate products to reduce ultra-processing
Thai Union: Übernehmen transparent nutritional labeling
Retailers: Promote shelf placement for whole foods
Thai FDA: Extend labeling to cover ultra-processing indicators
Ministry of Public Health: Stärken sugar tax and UPF marketing restrictions
ThaiHealth: Fund UPF health impact research

Support ASEAN food labeling harmonization
Eintreten über WHO SEARO for ultra-processed food regulation
Drängen auf Codex Alimentarius UPF classification standards
i: Thai FDA — regulates food safety and labeling. ThaiHealth (สำนักงานกองทุนสนับสนุนการสร้างเสริมสุขภาพ) — independent health promotion agency funded by a 2% surcharge on tobacco and alcohol taxes.
CP Group — one of the world's largest agri-food conglomerates. Thai Union — global seafood company (owner of Chicken of the Sea). Thai Beverage (ThaiBev) — major food and beverage company.
Ministry of Public Health — health policy. Thai FDA — food regulation. Thailand's sugar tax (2017) is one of the region's most progressive.

รัฐสภา (National Assembly) — bicameral: สภาผู้แทนราษฎร (House of Representatives, 500 members) and วุฒิสภา (Senate, 200 members). Thailand is a konstitutionelle Monarchie. Recent democratic restoration (2023 elections).

TJ.s: Poorest Central Asian Wirtschaft ($14.2B BIP). Mining 7.09% BIP (gold, silver, antimony). Landwirtschaft bei 19.7%. Aluminum smelting (TALCO). Remittance-dependent (~30% of BIP from Russia). Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Tajikistan's Bergbau sector includes artisanal gold Bergbau with mercury use and the TALCO aluminum smelter (one of Central Asia's largest polluters). Wenn per-facility Emissionen and Umwelt- data are published, W wird berechenbar.
bp: International buyer due diligence on Tajik mineral exports. Wenn aluminum and gold buyers require Umwelt- compliance verification, das überlappende Interesse an unregulated production wird geschwächt.
Per-facility Umwelt- monitoring data. TALCO's fluoride Emissionen and gold Bergbau mercury contamination can be measured and disclosed. Macht W berechenbar.
Teilweise brechbar. TALCO smelter Emissionen can be reduced with modern pot-lining and scrubbing technology. Mercury-free gold processing exists.
a: Report through international partner channels (IFC, EBRD)
Dokumentieren über Central Asian Umwelt- networks
Report through EITI channels (Tajikistan is a candidate country)
TALCO (Tajik Aluminum Company): Investieren in Emissionen reduction technology
Gold Bergbau companies: Übernehmen mercury-free processing
International buyers: Require Umwelt- compliance in supply contracts
Committee for Environmental Protection: Stärken Umwelt- enforcement
Ministry of Industry: Require TALCO Emissionen modernization
EITI Tajikistan: Expand to Umwelt- data
Support international pressure for Umwelt- standards in Tajik Bergbau through EBRD and IFC project conditionality
Eintreten über OSCE Umwelt- dimension for monitoring support
Drängen auf Minamata Convention enforcement on mercury in artisanal Bergbau
Support EITI candidacy advancement with Umwelt- disclosure
i: Note: Civil society space in Tajikistan is severely restricted. International channels provide the primary avenue for Umwelt- reporting. EBRD and IFC have invested in Tajik Bergbau.
TALCO — state aluminum company, one of the world's largest smelters. Operates in Tursunzoda (formerly Regar). Gold Bergbau includes both industrial and artisanal operations.
Committee for Environmental Protection under the Government — Umwelt- regulator. Ministry of Industry and New Technologies — industrial oversight.

Majlisi Oli (Parliament) — bicameral: Majlisi Namoyandagon (lower, 63 members) and Majlisi Milli (upper, 33 members). Note: effectively Einparteienstaat (PDPT). International channels: OSCE, SCO, EITI.

TM.s: Gas-dependent closed Wirtschaft ($51.4B BIP). Verarbeitendes Gewerbe bei 18% BIP. One of the world's most autoritär states. Massive gas reserves (Galkynysh — world's 2nd largest gas field). Data extremely limited — World Bank reports zeros for many indicators due to government opacity.

sectors.w: Turkmenistan is one of the world's largest methane emitters — satellite monitoring (Sentinel-5P, MethaneSAT) has revealed massive methane leaks from gas infrastructure. Wenn methane data is published, W wird berechenbar despite government opacity.
bp: Satellite-based methane monitoring bypasses government opacity. Wenn buyers (China — CNPC pipeline) face pressure to account for upstream methane, das überlappende Interesse an unmonitored gas production wird geschwächt.
Satellite methane emission monitoring (UNEP's IMEO — International Methane Emissions Observatory — has flagged Turkmenistan). Macht W berechenbar without government cooperation.
Nicht brechbar. Gas production and transport inherently leak methane, a greenhouse gas 80× more potent than CO₂ over 20 years.
a: Report through international channels only — no domestic Zivilgesellschaft exists
Provide data to UNEP IMEO or satellite monitoring organizations
Dokumentieren über Crude Accountability or Turkmen.news (exile media)
CNPC (Central Asia-China gas pipeline): Account for upstream methane in lifecycle Emissionen
International engineering firms: Include methane mitigation in infrastructure contracts
Buyers: Apply methane intensity standards to Turkmen gas
UNEP IMEO: Continue satellite monitoring and public reporting
Global Methane Pledge signatories: Press for engagement with Turkmenistan
IEA: Include Turkmenistan in methane tracker reports
Support satellite-based methane monitoring that bypasses government opacity
Eintreten über UNEP for Turkmenistan's engagement with the Global Methane Pledge
Drängen auf methane intensity standards in international gas trade
Support OSCE and UN human rights mechanisms for governance reform
i: Note: Turkmenistan is one of the world's most closed societies. No independent Zivilgesellschaft, media, or judiciary exists. Crude Accountability — international NGO documenting Umwelt- issues in the Caspian region. Turkmen.news — exile media.
Türkmengaz — state gas company. Türkmennebit — state oil company. CNPC — operates the Central Asia-China gas pipeline (Turkmenistan is the primary source). No independent corporate governance exists.
No independent domestic regulation exists. International monitoring provides the only oversight: UNEP IMEO, IEA Methane Tracker, satellite platforms (MethaneSAT, Sentinel-5P).

Mejlis (Parliament) — 125 members. Turkmenistan is an autoritär state — the legislature has no independent function. International channels: UN (UNEP, OHCHR), OSCE, CIS. Turkmenistan maintains permanent neutrality status (UN-recognized since 1995).

TN.s: North African Wirtschaft ($51.3B BIP). Landwirtschaft bei 9.7% BIP. Ölrenten 1.55%. Verarbeitendes Gewerbe bei 14.8%. Dienstleistungen bei 62.6%. Birthplace of the Arab Spring (2011). Governance backsliding since 2021 presidential power consolidation.

sectors.w: Tunisia's oil and gas production is modest but state oil company ETAP's revenue flows lack Transparenz. Wenn pro Feld Umwelt- and revenue data is published, W wird berechenbar.
bp: EITI-aligned revenue Transparenz. Tunisia's oil revenues are small relative to BIP but significant for the state budget. Transparent allocation breaks das überlappende Interesse an opaque revenue management.
Per-field Umwelt- monitoring and revenue flow disclosure. Macht W berechenbar.
Teilweise brechbar. Tunisia's mature fields are declining. Solar energy potential is enormous (Saharan irradiance) and can reduce hydrocarbon dependence.
a: Melden an ANPE (Agence Nationale de Protection de l'Environnement)
Dokumentieren über Tunisian Umwelt- organizations (FTDES — Forum Tunisien pour les Droits Économiques et Sociaux)
Report through ETAP compliance channels
ETAP (Entreprise Tunisienne d'Activités Pétrolières): Übernehmen revenue Transparenz standards
Investieren in solar energy transition
International partners (ENI, OMV): Apply home-country ESG standards to Tunisian operations
Ministry of Industry, Mines and Energy: Umsetzen hydrocarbon revenue Transparenz
ANPE: Stärken Umwelt- monitoring at production sites
ANME (Agence Nationale pour la Maîtrise de l'Énergie): Accelerate erneuerbare Energie targets
Engage through available parlamentarisch channels — Assemblée des Représentants du Peuple (161 members); note limited legislative independence under current governance
Support EU-Tunisia cooperation on energy transition
Eintreten über Union for the Mediterranean for erneuerbare Energie investment
Drängen auf EITI membership as governance Transparenz measure
i: ANPE — Umwelt- protection agency. FTDES — Tunisian economic and social rights forum, active on Umwelt- justice. Tunisia has relatively active Zivilgesellschaft despite recent governance concerns.
ETAP — state oil company. ENI (Italy), OMV (Austria) — major international operators in Tunisia. Tunisia's South Energy Transition Program targets renewable expansion.
Ministry of Industry, Mines and Energy — hydrocarbons oversight. ANME — energy efficiency and erneuerbare Energie agency.

Assemblée des Représentants du Peuple — unicameral, 161 members. Note: since 2021, presidential power consolidation has weakened legislative independence. International channels: Arab League, AU, Union for the Mediterranean.

TR.s: Major middle-income Wirtschaft ($1,359.1B BIP). Verarbeitendes Gewerbe bei 16.8% BIP. Dienstleistungen bei 57.5%. NATO member. Mining 0.63%. Landwirtschaft bei 5.8%. Significant coal dependence for electricity. G20 member.

sectors.w: Türkiye is expanding coal capacity (including imported coal plants) despite having excellent renewable potential. Wenn coal plant health costs are internalized, das überlappende Interesse an cheap coal power breaks.
bp: Carbon pricing or coal plant emission standards aligned with EU CBAM (Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism). Türkiye's EU customs union makes CBAM relevant to industrial exports. Wenn coal costs include carbon, renewables are cheaper.
Per-plant Emissionen and health cost data. Türkiye's coal plants are concentrated near population centers. HEAL and local NGOs have documented health costs. Macht W berechenbar.
Nicht brechbar. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂.
a: Melden an ÇŞB (Çevre, Şehircilik ve İklim Değişikliği Bakanlığı — Ministry of Environment, Urbanization and Climate Change)
Dokumentieren über TEMA Vakfı (Turkish Foundation for Combating Soil Erosion)
Report through Greenpeace Mediterranean Turkey office
EÜAŞ (Elektrik Üretim A.Ş.): Entwickeln coal phase-out timeline
Private coal operators: Investieren in renewable alternatives
Industrial companies: Switch to renewable electricity procurement
EPDK (Enerji Piyasası Düzenleme Kurumu — Energy Market Regulatory Authority): Reformieren tariffs to reflect Umwelt- costs
ÇŞB: Umsetzen emission standards aligned with EU IED
EMRA: Support erneuerbare Energie investment framework
Kontaktieren Sie Ihren Milletvekili in the Türkiye Büyük Millet Meclisi (600 members) um zu fordern coal phase-out timeline and health cost accounting
Eintreten über G20 for coal phase-out commitments
Drängen auf EU CBAM preparation to accelerate industrial decarbonization
Support NATO Green Defence Framework Umwelt- standards
i: ÇŞB — environment ministry. TEMA Vakfı — major Turkish Umwelt- NGO focused on soil and forest protection. Greenpeace Mediterranean — active in Türkiye on coal campaigns.
EÜAŞ — state electricity generation company. Significant private coal generation. Türkiye's 2053 net-zero target implies eventual coal phase-out but no timeline exists.
EPDK — energy market regulator. Türkiye ratified the Paris Agreement in 2021. EU Customs Union makes CBAM compliance relevant for Turkish industrial exports.

TBMM (Türkiye Büyük Millet Meclisi — Grand National Assembly) — unicameral, 600 members. Contact through tbmm.gov.tr. Türkiye is a presidential republic, NATO member, G20 member, EU customs union partner.

TT.s: Caribbean energy Wirtschaft ($25.6B BIP). Gasrenten 5.09%, oil rents 2.71% BIP. Major petrochemical and LNG producer (Atlantic LNG). Verarbeitendes Gewerbe bei 14.4%. Dienstleistungen bei 59.2%. Parliamentary Demokratie.

sectors.w: Trinidad's petrochemical industry faces maturing gas fields and declining production. As reserves deplete and global LNG competition increases, das überlappende Interesse an fossil fuel dependence wird geschwächt naturally.
bp: Declining natural gas reserves force economic diversification. Wenn production costs rise on mature fields, das überlappende Interesse an fossil fuel dependence wird geschwächt as alternative revenue sources become necessary.
Per-facility Emissionen and Umwelt- monitoring at Point Lisas industrial estate and Atlantic LNG. Macht W berechenbar.
Nicht brechbar. LNG and petrochemical processing emit CO₂ and other pollutants.
a: Melden an EMA (Environmental Management Authority)
Melden an MEEI (Ministry of Energy and Energy Industries)
Dokumentieren über Fishermen and Friends of the Sea (Umwelt- NGO)
NGC (National Gas Company): Entwickeln gas-to-renewables transition plan
Atlantic LNG: Umsetzen carbon capture at liquefaction facility
Petrochemical companies (Methanex, Nutrien): Reduce process Emissionen
EMA: Stärken air quality monitoring around Point Lisas
MEEI: Entwickeln erneuerbare Energie framework
RIC (Regulated Industries Commission): Reformieren energy pricing
Kontaktieren Sie Ihren Member of Parliament in the House of Representatives (41 members) um zu fordern economic diversification and erneuerbare Energie policy
Support CARICOM energy transition framework
Eintreten über Alliance of Small Island States (AOSIS) for climate finance
Drängen auf IMO shipping emission standards (Trinidad is a major bunkering port)
i: EMA — the Environmental Management Authority, established under the Environmental Management Act 2000. Fishermen and Friends of the Sea — Trinidad's most active Umwelt- NGO.
NGC (National Gas Company of Trinidad and Tobago) — state gas company. Atlantic LNG — joint venture (Shell, BP, NGC). Point Lisas Industrial Estate — petrochemical complex.
MEEI — energy ministry. RIC — utilities regulator. Trinidad has extremely low domestic energy prices (subsidized), discouraging efficiency.
Parliament of Trinidad and Tobago — bicameral: House of Representatives (41 members) and Senate (31 members). Parliamentary Demokratie with competitive elections. Contact through ttparliament.org.

TZ.s: East African Wirtschaft ($78.8B BIP). Landwirtschaft bei 23.3% BIP. Mining 4.03% (gold, tanzanite — found only in Tanzania). Forstrenten 2.39%. Gas reserves (offshore). Dienstleistungen bei 29.6%. Growing Wirtschaft with improving governance.

sectors.w: Tanzania's gold Bergbau (Barrick/Twiga Minerals, AngloGold Ashanti) generates tailings and mercury contamination (artisanal sector). Wenn pro Mine Umwelt- data is published alongside revenue, W wird berechenbar.
bp: Mining Act 2017 local content and Transparenz requirements. Wenn enforced alongside Umwelt- monitoring, das überlappende Interesse an opaque extraction wird geschwächt.
Per-mine Umwelt- monitoring data through TEITI (Tanzania Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative). Macht W berechenbar.
Teilweise brechbar. Mercury-free artisanal Bergbau and improved tailings management reduce Systemabhängigkeit.
a: Melden an NEMC (National Environment Management Council)
Melden an Mining Commission
Dokumentieren über LEAT (Lawyers' Environmental Action Team)
Twiga Minerals (Barrick/Government JV): Umsetzen international Umwelt- standards
AngloGold Ashanti (Geita Gold Mine): Übernehmen enhanced tailings management
Tanzanite One: Publish Umwelt- and community impact data
Mining Commission: Durchsetzen Umwelt- conditions in Bergbau licenses
NEMC: Stärken Umwelt- impact assessment requirements
TEITI: Expand to include Umwelt- data
Kontaktieren Sie Ihren Mbunge in the Bunge la Tanzania (393 members) um zu fordern Umwelt- enforcement in Bergbau
Support EITI enhanced reporting with Umwelt- data
Eintreten über EAC for regional Bergbau Umwelt- standards
Drängen auf Minamata Convention enforcement on mercury in artisanal Bergbau
i: NEMC — Umweltbehörde. Mining Commission — Bergbau sector regulator. LEAT — Tanzanian Umwelt- law NGO. HakiRasilimali (Publish What You Pay Tanzania) — revenue Transparenz advocacy.

Twiga Minerals — 50/50 joint venture between Barrick Gold and Government of Tanzania (created after 2017 tax dispute). Geita Gold Mine — AngloGold Ashanti operation. STAMICO (State Mining Corporation) — government Bergbau entity.
Mining Commission — established under Mining Act 2017. TEITI (Tanzania Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative) — EITI member since 2009.

Bunge la Tanzania (National Assembly) — unicameral, 393 members. Tanzania is a presidential republic with increasing political openness under current administration. Contact through bunge.go.tz. EAC (East African Community) member.

UA.s: War-affected Wirtschaft ($190.7B BIP). Mining 5.32% BIP. Militärausgaben 34.48% BIP (wartime). Landwirtschaft bei 7.1%. Coal 0.34%. EU-Kandidat country (2022). Under Russian invasion since February 2022. Massive Umwelt- damage from war.

sectors.w: Ukraine's Bergbau sector (iron ore, manganese, titanium) has suffered massive Umwelt- damage from the Russian invasion — flooded mines, destroyed infrastructure, contaminated land. Post-war reconstruction offers opportunity for transparent Umwelt- standards. Wenn reconstruction Umwelt- data is published, W wird berechenbar.
bp: EU accession conditionality requiring Umwelt- standards in post-war reconstruction. Wenn reconstruction adheres to EU Umwelt- acquis, das überlappende Interesse an rapid but dirty rebuilding wird geschwächt.
Environmental damage assessment and remediation tracking. Ukraine's Ministry of Environmental Protection is already documenting war damage with international support. Macht W berechenbar.
Teilweise brechbar. Mining inherently disturbs landscapes, but post-war reconstruction can implement best-practice tailings management and water treatment from the start.
a: Melden an Derzhekoinspektsiia (State Environmental Inspectorate)
Dokumentieren über OSCE Umwelt- monitoring
Report war-related Umwelt- damage through Ukraine's Ecodozor platform
Metinvest (Akhmetov): Umsetzen EU-aligned Umwelt- standards in reconstruction
ArcelorMittal Kryvyi Rih: Apply global Umwelt- standards
Reconstruction companies: Übernehmen green building and Umwelt- remediation standards
Ministry of Environmental Protection: Durchsetzen Umwelt- standards in reconstruction
State Subsoil Service: Reformieren Bergbau licensing with Umwelt- conditions
EU pre-accession assistance: Support Umwelt- governance capacity building
Kontaktieren Sie Ihren Narodnyi deputat in the Verkhovna Rada (450 members) um zu fordern Umwelt- standards in reconstruction legislation
Support Ukraine Recovery Conference Umwelt- commitments
Eintreten über EU accession process for Umwelt- chapter prioritization
Drängen auf international Umwelt- damage assessment and Russian liability for war-related Umwelt- destruction
i: Derzhekoinspektsiia — State Environmental Inspectorate. Ministry of Environmental Protection and Natural Resources — documents war-related Umwelt- damage. Ecodozor — citizen reporting platform.
Metinvest — Ukraine's largest steel and Bergbau group (Rinat Akhmetov). ArcelorMittal Kryvyi Rih — major steel producer. Ferrexpo — iron ore pellet producer.
Ministry of Environmental Protection and Natural Resources. State Subsoil Service (Derzhgeonadra) — Bergbau licensing. Ukraine's EU candidacy requires Umwelt- acquis alignment.

Verkhovna Rada — unicameral, 450 members. Contact through rada.gov.ua. EU-Kandidat country since 2022. International channels: EU accession process, Ukraine Recovery Conference, International Criminal Court (Umwelt- damage documentation).

UG.s: East African Wirtschaft ($53.9B BIP). Landwirtschaft bei 24.6% BIP. Forstrenten 7.48% (one of the highest in the dataset). Oil production beginning (Tilenga and Kingfisher projects, EACOP pipeline). Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Uganda's new oil projects (TotalEnergies' Tilenga and CNOOC's Kingfisher, plus EACOP — East African Crude Oil Pipeline) face massive international scrutiny. Wenn project-level Umwelt- data is published, W wird berechenbar.
bp: International ESG pressure on project financiers. Wenn banks and insurers withdraw from EACOP financing, das überlappende Interesse an unscrutinized pipeline construction wird geschwächt. Several major banks have already declined.
Per-project Umwelt- impact data for Tilenga (in Murchison Falls National Park), Kingfisher, and EACOP. Macht W berechenbar.
Nicht brechbar. Crude oil production and 1,443-km heated pipeline through sensitive ecosystems inherently create Umwelt- risk.
a: Melden an NEMA (National Environment Management Authority)
Dokumentieren über international Umwelt- organizations (350.org, BankTrack)
Report through TotalEnergies compliance channels
TotalEnergies: Umsetzen comprehensive biodiversity offsets for Tilenga (inside Murchison Falls NP)
CNOOC Uganda: Übernehmen international Umwelt- standards for Kingfisher
Banks: Apply Equator Principles to EACOP financing decisions
PAU (Petroleum Authority of Uganda): Durchsetzen Umwelt- conditions in production licenses
NEMA: Stärken Umwelt- monitoring of oil projects
MEMD (Ministry of Energy and Mineral Entwickelnment): Ensure transparent revenue management
Support international ESG pressure on EACOP project financing
Eintreten über European Parliament for TotalEnergies duty of vigilance enforcement (French Loi de Vigilance)
Drängen auf EITI membership with Umwelt- disclosure
Support East African Court of Justice jurisdiction on transboundary Umwelt- issues
i: NEMA — Umweltbehörde. Note: Ugandan Umwelt- activists have faced government harassment. International channels are safer: 350.org has led the #StopEACOP campaign. BankTrack monitors EACOP financing.

TotalEnergies — operator of Tilenga project and EACOP. CNOOC Uganda — operates Kingfisher project. EACOP (East African Crude Oil Pipeline) — 1,443 km from Hoima to Tanga (Tanzania). UNOC (Uganda National Oil Company) — state oil company.
PAU — petroleum sector regulator. MEMD — energy and mineral development ministry. Uganda's Petroleum Revenue Management policy is under development.

Parliament of Uganda — unicameral, 529 members. Note: Uganda is effectively under one-party dominant governance (NRM). International channels: EAC (East African Community), African Court on Human and Peoples' Rights, European Parliament (regarding EU-headquartered companies like TotalEnergies).

UY.s: Small South American Wirtschaft ($81B BIP). Landwirtschaft bei 6.4% BIP. Dienstleistungen bei 65.3%. Forstrenten 1.91%. Generates nearly 100% of electricity from renewables (wind, hydro, solar, biomass). Strong Demokratie — one of Latin America's most stable.

sectors.w: Uruguay's soy and eucalyptus monoculture expansion is degrading soils and displacing native grasslands (campos). Wenn soil health and biodiversity data is linked to agricultural production per department, W wird berechenbar.
bp: National soil conservation plan enforcement. Uruguay's Ley de Uso y Conservación de Suelos (Soil Use and Conservation Law) requires mandatory soil plans — strengthening enforcement breaks das überlappende Interesse an soil-exhaustive monoculture.
Per-farm soil erosion and grassland conversion monitoring. MGAP already requires Plan de Uso y Manejo de Suelos for farms >50 ha. Publishing compliance data makes W computable.
Teilweise brechbar. Soy monoculture and eucalyptus plantations degrade native grassland ecosystems. Integrated crop-livestock systems and native grassland preservation reduce Systemabhängigkeit.
a: Melden an DINAMA (Dirección Nacional de Medio Ambiente)
Melden an RENARE (Dirección General de Recursos Naturales Renovables)
Dokumentieren über Vida Silvestre Uruguay
Large agricultural companies: Stärken soil conservation plan compliance
UPM, Montes del Plata (forestry): Maintain native grassland corridors between eucalyptus plantations
Meat exporters: Übernehmen pasture-based certification
MGAP (Ministerio de Ganadería, Agricultura y Pesca): Durchsetzen mandatory soil plans
DINAMA: Stärken Umwelt- assessment for land-use change
INIA (Instituto Nacional de Investigación Agropecuaria): Publish soil health monitoring data
Kontaktieren Sie Ihren Diputado in the Cámara de Representantes (99 members) or Senador in the Cámara de Senadores (30 members) um zu fordern enforcement of the Soil Conservation Law
Support Mercosur Umwelt- cooperation frameworks
Advocate for native grassland (campos) conservation in international biodiversity frameworks
Drängen auf soil carbon accounting in climate commitments
i: DINAMA — national environment directorate. RENARE — renewable natural resources directorate under MGAP. Vida Silvestre Uruguay — biodiversity conservation organization.
UPM (Finnish company) — major eucalyptus plantation and pulp mill operator. Montes del Plata (UPM/Arauco) — forestry. Large-scale soy farming often by Brazilian/Argentine operators.
MGAP — agriculture, livestock and fisheries ministry. INIA — national agricultural research institute.
Asamblea General — bicameral: Cámara de Representantes (99 members) and Cámara de Senadores (30 members). Contact through parlamento.gub.uy. Uruguay is one of Latin America's strongest democracies.

UZ.s: Central Asian Wirtschaft ($115B BIP). Gasrenten 11.04% BIP. Mining 8.5% (gold — Muruntau is world's largest open-pit gold mine, uranium). Landwirtschaft bei 18.3%. Verarbeitendes Gewerbe bei 20.2%. Post-Karimov liberalization (since 2016).

sectors.w: Uzbekistan's gas sector (Uzbekneftegaz) consumes most production domestically at heavily subsidized prices, encouraging waste. Wenn pro Feld production and domestic consumption data is published, W wird berechenbar.
bp: Gas price reform eliminating subsidies that encourage wasteful consumption. Wenn domestic gas prices reflect market value, das überlappende Interesse an underpriced energy wird geschwächt.
Per-field production, distribution, and consumption data. Uzbekistan has begun EITI implementation. Macht W berechenbar.
Teilweise brechbar. Gas combustion emits CO₂. However, Uzbekistan's enormous solar potential (300+ sunny days/year) can displace gas in electricity generation.
a: Melden an State Committee for Ecology and Environmental Protection
Report through EITI Uzbekistan channels
Dokumentieren über international partner organizations
Uzbekneftegaz: Publish pro Feld production and Umwelt- data
Navoi Mining (NMMC): Übernehmen international Umwelt- standards for gold and uranium Bergbau
Reduce methane leakage from gas infrastructure
Ministry of Energy: Umsetzen gas price reform roadmap
Goskomekologiya: Stärken Umwelt- enforcement at Bergbau and gas facilities
EITI Uzbekistan: Expand to Umwelt- data disclosure
Engage through Oliy Majlis (parliament) — bicameral: Legislative Chamber (150 members) and Senate (100 members)
Support EITI enhanced reporting with Umwelt- data
Eintreten über EBRD and ADB for gas price reform conditionality
Drängen auf Aral Sea Umwelt- restoration international cooperation
i: State Committee for Ecology and Environmental Protection (Goskomekologiya) — Umwelt- regulator. EITI Uzbekistan — Uzbekistan became an EITI member in 2021.
Uzbekneftegaz — state gas company. NMMC (Navoi Mining and Metallurgical Company) — operates Muruntau gold mine (world's largest open-pit) and uranium mines. Almalyk MMC — copper and gold Bergbau.
Ministry of Energy — energy policy. Goskomekologiya — Umwelt- regulation. Uzbekistan has been implementing significant economic reforms since 2016.

Oliy Majlis — bicameral: Legislative Chamber (Qonunchilik palatasi, 150 members) and Senate, 100 members. Note: limited political pluralism. International channels: EITI, EBRD, ADB, SCO. Aral Sea Umwelt- disaster requires international cooperation.

VE.s: Oil-dependent Wirtschaft in crisis ($119.8B BIP — severely contracted from peak). World's largest proven oil reserves. Economic data largely unavailable (World Bank reports zeros for most indicators). Hyperinflation, mass emigration. Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Venezuela's oil industry has collapsed from ~3.3M bpd (1990s) to ~700K bpd due to mismanagement, underinvestment, and Sanktionen. The überlappendes Interesse is already weakened by operational failure.
bp: Production collapse has already weakened the überlappendes Interesse — PDVSA lacks the capital and technical capacity to maintain production. Sanctions further constrain revenue.
Oil revenue Transparenz is impossible under current governance opacity. However, international Sanktionen monitoring (OFAC designations) provides partial W computability.
Nicht brechbar. Oil extraction and refining emit CO₂. Venezuela's heavy crude (Orinoco Belt) is particularly Emissionen-intensive to process.
a: Report through international channels (Transparencia Venezuela, PROVEA)
Dokumentieren über exile media and research organizations
Provide data to international Sanktionen enforcement authorities
International oil companies with remaining interests (Chevron, Repsol, ENI): Apply Umwelt- standards to limited operations
Chevron: Publish per-facility Umwelt- data for Venezuela operations
Service companies: Maintain Umwelt- standards in contracted work
OFAC: Maintain Sanktionen conditionality linked to governance reform
EU: Coordinate Sanktionen policy
OPEC: Address Venezuela's production reporting Transparenz
Support international Sanktionen conditionality requiring democratic governance and Umwelt- standards
Eintreten über Lima Group/International Contact Group for governance reform
Drängen auf PDVSA operational and Umwelt- Transparenz as condition of Sanktionen relief
Support post-transition EITI membership planning
i: Note: No independent domestic institutions exist. Transparencia Venezuela — anti-corruption NGO. PROVEA — Venezuelan human rights organization. Operating environment is extremely hostile to Zivilgesellschaft.
PDVSA (Petróleos de Venezuela, S.A.) — state oil company, severely degraded operationally. Chevron — received limited US OFAC license to operate. Repsol, ENI — maintain limited presence.

No independent domestic regulation exists. OFAC (Office of Foreign Assets Control, US Treasury) — administers Venezuela Sanktionen. EU — maintains Sanktionen. PDVSA is both regulator and operator — no separation exists.

Asamblea Nacional — 277 members. Note: Venezuela's institutions lack independence under current governance. International channels: OAS (Venezuela withdrawn/suspended), International Contact Group, ICC preliminary examination, Lima Group (reduced activity).

VN.s: Fast-growing Wirtschaft ($476.4B BIP). Verarbeitendes Gewerbe bei 24.4% BIP. Landwirtschaft bei 11.9%. Kohlerenten 0.38%. Oil 0.67%. Forstrenten 1.07%. Major electronics and textile manufacturing hub. One-party state (Communist Party).

sectors.w: Viet Nam is rapidly expanding coal power capacity despite excellent renewable potential (solar, wind, offshore wind). JETP (Just Energy Transition Partnership) funding ($15.5B pledged) creates leverage to shift the überlappendes Interesse away from coal.
bp: JETP implementation — $15.5B pledged by international partners for coal-to-renewables transition. Wenn JETP funding makes renewables cheaper than new coal, das überlappende Interesse an coal expansion breaks.
Per-plant Emissionen and health cost data. Viet Nam's coal plants are concentrated in the north (Quảng Ninh) and south (Bình Thuận). Macht W berechenbar.
Nicht brechbar. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and CO₂.
a: Melden an MONRE (Bộ Tài nguyên và Môi trường — Ministry of Natural Resources and Environment)
Dokumentieren über VUSTA (Viet Nam Union of Science and Technology Associations)
Report through international development partner channels (World Bank, ADB)
EVN (Electricity of Viet Nam): Accelerate Power Entwickelnment Plan VIII renewable targets
PVN (PetroVietnam): Investieren in offshore wind
International manufacturers (Samsung, Intel): Demand renewable electricity procurement options
MOIT (Ministry of Industry and Trade): Umsetzen PDP VIII renewable targets
MONRE: Stärken emission standards for coal plants
JETP Secretariat: Accelerate disbursement of transition funding
Support JETP implementation monitoring through international partner coordination
Eintreten über ASEAN for regional energy transition cooperation
Drängen auf JETP Transparenz and accountability mechanisms
Support World Bank and ADB erneuerbare Energie financing for Viet Nam
i: MONRE — environment and natural resources ministry. VUSTA — umbrella organization for Vietnamese Zivilgesellschaft (within party framework). Note: independent Zivilgesellschaft is not permitted in Viet Nam's one-party system.

EVN (Tập đoàn Điện lực Việt Nam) — state electricity utility. PVN (PetroVietnam) — state oil and gas company. TKV (Vinacomin — Tập đoàn Công nghiệp Than - Khoáng sản Việt Nam) — state coal Bergbau company.

MOIT — energy and industrial policy. PDP VIII (Power Entwickelnment Plan VIII, approved 2023) — sets erneuerbare Energie targets. JETP — Just Energy Transition Partnership ($15.5B pledged by IPG partners including US, EU, UK, Japan).

Quốc hội (National Assembly) — unicameral, 500 members. Viet Nam is a Einparteienstaat (Communist Party). JETP International Partners Group provides the primary leverage mechanism. International channels: ASEAN, World Bank, ADB, JETP IPG.

XK.s: Small Western Balkan Wirtschaft ($11.2B BIP). Verarbeitendes Gewerbe bei 12.6%. Kohlerenten 0.38%. Mining 0.55%. Landwirtschaft bei 7.3%. Youngest population in Europe. EU-Kandidat status pending. Two aging lignite plants (Kosovo A and B) supply ~95% of electricity.

sectors.w: Kosovo's near-total dependence on two aging lignite plants (Kosovo A — one of Europe's worst polluters — and Kosovo B) faces EU accession conditionality and enormous health costs.
bp: EU accession pathway requiring IED/LCPD compliance. Kosovo A is scheduled for decommissioning. Wenn Umwelt- compliance costs are applied, new renewables are cheaper than coal retrofit.
Per-plant Emissionen and health cost data. Kosovo A and B cause severe air pollution in Pristina — among Europe's worst air quality. Macht W berechenbar.
Nicht brechbar. Lignite combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂.
a: Melden an AMMK (Agjencia për Mbrojtjen e Mjedisit të Kosovës — Kosovo Environmental Protection Agency)
Dokumentieren über INDEP or GAP Institute (Kosovo think tanks)
Report through KEK compliance channels
KEK (Korporata Energjetike e Kosovës): Plan Kosovo A decommissioning and Kosovo B modernization or replacement
Investieren in solar and wind capacity
Umsetzen just transition plans for Obiliq/Kastriot Bergbau communities
ERO (Energy Regulatory Office): Reformieren tariffs to incentivize renewable investment
MMPH (Ministry of Environment): Durchsetzen emission standards
Energy Community Secretariat: Hold Kosovo accountable for compliance
Kontaktieren Sie Ihren Deputet in the Kuvendi i Kosovës (120 members) um zu fordern Kosovo A decommissioning timeline and erneuerbare Energie investment
Support EU integration benchmarks on Umwelt- standards
Eintreten über Energy Community for just transition support
Drängen auf World Bank and EBRD financing of erneuerbare Energie replacement
i: AMMK — Umwelt- protection agency. INDEP (Institute for Entwickelnment Policy) — research and advocacy. GAP Institute — Kosovo public policy think tank.
KEK — Kosovo Energy Corporation, staatliches, operates Kosovo A (5 units, 800 MW, built 1962-1975) and Kosovo B (2 units, 678 MW, built 1983-1984). KOSTT — transmission system operator.
ERO — Energieregulierungsbehörde. MMPH (Ministria e Mjedisit, Planifikimit Hapësinor dhe Infrastrukturës) — environment ministry. Kosovo is an Energy Community Treaty member.

Kuvendi i Kosovës (Assembly of Kosovo) — unicameral, 120 members. Contact through kuvendikosoves.org. Kosovo declared independence in 2008 (recognized by ~100 UN members). Energy Community Treaty member.

ZA.s: Largest sub-Saharan Wirtschaft ($401.1B BIP). Kohlerenten 2.44% BIP. Mining 3.83% (gold, platinum group metals, chrome, manganese). Verarbeitendes Gewerbe bei 12.8%. Dienstleistungen bei 63%. Constitutional Demokratie. Severe electricity crisis (load shedding).

sectors.w: South Africa generates ~80% of electricity from coal (Eskom's aging fleet). JETP funding ($8.5B pledged) and Eskom's operational crisis (load shedding) create dual pressure. Wenn coal plant health costs are internalized, the überlappendes Interesse breaks.
bp: JETP implementation and Eskom restructuring. $8.5B pledged for coal-to-renewables transition. Wenn renewable IPPs are cheaper and more reliable than aging coal plants, das überlappende Interesse an coal dependence breaks.

Per-plant Emissionen, health costs, and reliability data. Eskom's coal fleet is extensively documented — multiple plants fail to meet South Africa's own emission standards (granted repeated postponements). Macht W berechenbar.
Nicht brechbar. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂. South Africa's coal is high-ash content, exacerbating particulate Emissionen.
a: Melden an DFFE (Department of Forestry, Fischerei and the Environment)
Report through groundWork or Centre for Environmental Rights
Dokumentieren über Public Protector complaints
Eskom: Umsetzen coal plant decommissioning schedule aligned with IRP 2019
Mining companies (Exxaro, Thungela, Seriti): Entwickeln coal transition plans
Renewable IPPs: Scale deployment to replace coal capacity
NERSA (National Energy Regulator): Reformieren tariffs to reflect coal externalities
DFFE: Durchsetzen Minimum Emission Standards without further postponements
DMRE (Department of Mineral Resources and Energy): Accelerate IRP 2019 renewable targets
Kontaktieren Sie Ihren Member of Parliament in the National Assembly (400 members) or NCOP (National Council of Provinces, 90 members) um zu fordern Eskom emission standard compliance
Support JETP implementation and accountability mechanisms
Eintreten über BRICS for just energy transition principles
Drängen auf climate finance delivery through Green Climate Fund
i: DFFE — the environment department. groundWork — South African Umwelt- justice organization. Centre for Environmental Rights — public interest Umwelt- law organization. Life After Coal campaign — coalition challenging Eskom's coal dependence.

Eskom — state electricity utility, operates 15 coal-fired power stations. Exxaro Resources — coal Bergbau. Thungela Resources — thermal coal (spun off from Anglo American). Seriti Resources — coal Bergbau. REIPPPP (Renewable Energy Independent Power Producer Procurement Programme) — auction program.

NERSA — Energieregulierungsbehörde. DMRE — mineral resources and energy department. IRP 2019 (Integrated Resource Plan) — South Africa's electricity plan. JETP Investment Plan — guides $8.5B transition funding.

Parliament of South Africa — bicameral: National Assembly (400 members) and National Council of Provinces (90 members). Contact through parliament.gov.za. South Africa is a constitutional Demokratie, G20 member, BRICS member. JETP International Partners Group: France, Germany, UK, US, EU.

ZM.s: Southern African Wirtschaft ($25.3B BIP). Mining 28.25% BIP — one of the highest Bergbau dependencies globally (copper). Forstrenten 6.78%. Dienstleistungen bei 57.2%. Africa's second-largest copper producer. Democratic governance with peaceful power transitions.

sectors.w: Zambia's copper Bergbau generates acid mine drainage and SO₂ from smelting (Mopani, KCM — historically among Africa's worst polluters). Wenn pro Mine Umwelt- data is published, W wird berechenbar.
bp: Mining royalty reform with Umwelt- earmarking. Wenn Bergbau revenue is partly allocated to Umwelt- remediation, das überlappende Interesse an externalizing pollution costs wird geschwächt.
Per-mine Umwelt- monitoring data through ZEITI and ZEMA. Macht W berechenbar.
Teilweise brechbar. Copper smelting Emissionen can be reduced with modern sulfuric acid capture technology. Mopani smelter upgrade demonstrates this.
a: Melden an ZEMA (Zambia Environmental Management Agency)
Dokumentieren über community organizations in Copperbelt Province
Report through Bergbau company compliance channels
First Quantum Minerals (Kansanshi): Umsetzen international Umwelt- standards
Barrick Gold (Lumwana): Übernehmen enhanced tailings management
ZCCM-IH (state Bergbau holding): Require Umwelt- compliance from partners
ZEMA: Durchsetzen emission standards for copper smelters
Ministry of Mines: Stärken Umwelt- conditions in Bergbau licenses
ZEITI: Expand to include Umwelt- data
Kontaktieren Sie Ihren Member of Parliament in the National Assembly (156 members) um zu fordern Umwelt- enforcement on the Copperbelt
Support EITI enhanced reporting with Umwelt- data
Eintreten über SADC for regional Bergbau Umwelt- standards
Drängen auf responsible mineral supply chain standards (copper is critical for energy transition)
i: ZEMA — Umwelt- management agency. Copperbelt communities have suffered decades of SO₂ and heavy metal pollution — documented by multiple studies and legal cases (e.g., Vedanta/KCM litigation in UK courts).

First Quantum Minerals — operates Kansanshi (one of Africa's largest copper mines) and Sentinel mines. Barrick Gold — operates Lumwana copper mine. Mopani Copper Mines — majority owned by ZCCM-IH after Glencore divestment. KCM (Konkola Copper Mines) — under provisional liquidation.
Ministry of Mines and Minerals Entwickelnment. ZEITI (Zambia Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative) — EITI member. Mining Cadastre Department — licensing authority.

National Assembly of Zambia — unicameral, 156 elected members + 8 nominated. Contact through parliament.gov.zm. Zambia is a presidential republic with competitive elections (peaceful transitions in 1991, 2011, 2021). SADC (Southern African Entwickelnment Community) member.

ZW.s: Southern African Wirtschaft ($41.5B BIP). Mining 4.24% BIP (platinum group metals, gold, lithium, diamonds). Landwirtschaft bei 8.7%. Verarbeitendes Gewerbe bei 15.6%. Forstrenten 1.82%. Governance concerns. Major lithium reserves (Bikita, Arcadia).

sectors.w: Zimbabwe's Bergbau sector is expanding rapidly (lithium — critical for EV batteries — and PGMs). Wenn pro Mine Umwelt- data is published alongside revenue, W wird berechenbar.
bp: International supply chain due diligence for critical minerals (lithium for EU Battery Regulation compliance). Wenn EU buyers require Umwelt- verification, das überlappende Interesse an unregulated extraction wird geschwächt.
Per-mine Umwelt- monitoring through ZEITI (Zimbabwe applied for EITI candidacy). Macht W berechenbar.
Teilweise brechbar. Lithium Bergbau (hard-rock) generates waste rock and uses water. Best-practice processing and water recycling reduce Systemabhängigkeit.
a: Melden an EMA (Environmental Management Agency)
Dokumentieren über ZELA (Zimbabwe Environmental Law Association)
Report through international Bergbau company compliance channels
Zimplats (Impala Platinum): Umsetzen international Umwelt- standards
Prospect Lithium (Bikita Minerals): Übernehmen responsible lithium Bergbau practices
Zim Integrated (Arcadia): Apply EU Battery Regulation-aligned Umwelt- standards
Ministry of Mines: Durchsetzen Umwelt- conditions in Bergbau licenses
EMA: Stärken Umwelt- impact assessment for lithium projects
ZMDC (Zimbabwe Mining Entwickelnment Corporation): Require Umwelt- compliance from joint venture partners
Engage through available parlamentarisch channels — Parliament of Zimbabwe: National Assembly (270 members) and Senate (80 members); note limited political pluralism in practice
Support EU Battery Regulation supply chain due diligence requirements for Zimbabwean lithium
Eintreten über SADC Mining Protocol for regional Umwelt- standards
Drängen auf EITI membership to improve Bergbau Transparenz
i: EMA — Umwelt- management agency. ZELA — Umwelt- law organization. Note: Zivilgesellschaft space is constrained in Zimbabwe.

Zimplats — Zimbabwe's largest PGM producer (Impala Platinum subsidiary). Bikita Minerals — lithium Bergbau (Sinomine Resources acquired). Arcadia Lithium — major lithium deposit (Zhejiang Huayou Cobalt acquired). Caledonia Mining — gold.
Ministry of Mines and Mining Entwickelnment. EMA — Umwelt- regulation. ZMDC — state Bergbau company. Zimbabwe's Mines and Minerals Act governs the sector.

Parliament of Zimbabwe — bicameral: National Assembly (270 members) and Senate (80 members). Note: ZANU-PF dominance limits effective legislative oversight. International channels: SADC, AU, EITI (Zimbabwe has expressed interest in joining).

CN.s: World's second-largest Wirtschaft ($18,743.8B BIP). Verarbeitendes Gewerbe bei 24.9% BIP — global factory floor. Kohlerenten 0.61%. Industrie bei 36.5%. Dienstleistungen bei 56.7%. One-party state (CPC). World's largest CO₂ emitter. Rapid renewable deployment alongside continued coal expansion.

sectors.w: China operates ~1,100 GW of coal capacity — more than the rest of the world combined. However, China also deploys more erneuerbare Energie annually than any other country. Wenn renewable deployment makes new coal uneconomic, das überlappende Interesse an coal expansion breaks.
bp: Renewable energy cost competitiveness — China's solar and wind are already cheaper than new coal in most provinces. Wenn existing coal plants become more expensive to run than new renewables, the überlappendes Interesse breaks. This is already happening in eastern provinces.
Per-plant Emissionen data. China's national ETS (launched 2021) covers ~4.5 billion tonnes CO₂. Expanding coverage from electricity to industry sectors makes W computable.
Nicht brechbar. Coal combustion releases CO₂, SO₂, PM2.5, and mercury by chemistry.
a: Melden an MEE (Ministry of Ecology and Environment, 生态环境部)
Report through provincial Umwelt- protection bureaus
Dokumentieren über 12369 Umwelt- complaint hotline
State energy companies (CHN Energy, Huaneng, Datang, Huadian, SPIC): Accelerate coal-to-renewables transition
Reduce new coal plant approvals
Investieren in grid-scale storage to enable renewable integration
NEA (National Energy Administration, 国家能源局): Limit new coal approvals to replace-and-retire
MEE: Accelerate national ETS coverage expansion to cement, steel, aluminum
NDRC: Align electricity market reform with carbon reduction targets
Support US-China climate cooperation mechanisms (Sunnylands process)
Eintreten über COP process for China's coal phase-down commitments
Drängen auf national ETS carbon price to rise above marginal abatement cost
Support technology cooperation on CCS and grid-scale storage
i: MEE (Ministry of Ecology and Environment) — central Umweltbehörde. 12369 hotline — Umwelt- complaint system receiving millions of reports annually. Provincial Environmental Protection Bureaus — local enforcement. IPE (Institute of Public & Environmental Affairs, 公众环境研究中心) — Ma Jun's NGO providing corporate Umwelt- data.

China's 'Big Five' power generators: CHN Energy (国家能源集团), China Huaneng (华能), China Datang (大唐), China Huadian (华电), SPIC (国家电投). All staatliches, collectively operating most coal capacity. Also rapidly scaling renewables.

NEA (National Energy Administration) — energy planning and regulation. NDRC (National Entwickelnment and Reformieren Commission, 国家发展和改革委员会) — economic planning, sets electricity prices. National ETS — world's largest carbon market by coverage (power sector).

National People's Congress (全国人民代表大会) — ~3,000 members. China is a Einparteienstaat — the NPC does not function as an independent legislature. International channels: US-China climate bilateral, COP/UNFCCC, G20. China's dual carbon targets: peak CO₂ before 2030, carbon neutrality by 2060.

KR.s: Advanced Wirtschaft ($1,875.4B BIP). Verarbeitendes Gewerbe bei 26.6% BIP (semiconductors, automobiles, shipbuilding, petrochemicals). Dienstleistungen bei 57.5%. Heavy energy import dependence. Fourth-largest coal importer globally. G20 member. Vibrant Demokratie.

sectors.w: South Korea operates ~37 GW of coal capacity and is the world's 4th-largest coal importer. The 10th Basic Plan for Electricity Supply and Demand targets coal phase-down. Wenn carbon pricing (K-ETS) makes coal uncompetitive versus LNG and renewables, the überlappendes Interesse breaks.
bp: K-ETS (Korea Emissions Trading Scheme) carbon price escalation. Wenn carbon costs make coal-fired generation more expensive than LNG and renewables, das überlappende Interesse an coal dependence breaks.
Per-plant Emissionen and health cost data. Korea Environment Institute and Korean medical associations have documented coal plant health impacts. Macht W berechenbar.
Nicht brechbar. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and CO₂.
a: Melden an Ministry of Environment (환경부)
Dokumentieren über KFEM (Korean Federation for Environmental Movements, 환경운동연합)
Report through KEPCO compliance channels
KEPCO (Korea Electric Power Corporation, 한국전력공사): Umsetzen coal retirement schedule aligned with NDC
POSCO: Scale hydrogen-based steelmaking (HyREX)
Samsung, SK, Hyundai: Expand renewable electricity procurement (RE100 commitments)
MOTIE (Ministry of Trade, Industry and Energy, 산업통상자원부): Accelerate coal retirement in Basic Electricity Plan
Ministry of Environment: Stärken K-ETS carbon price floor
KPX (Korea Power Exchange): Reformieren merit order to disadvantage coal
Kontaktieren Sie Ihren 국회의원 (Member of the National Assembly, 300 members) um zu fordern coal phase-out timeline in energy legislation
Support Powering Past Coal Alliance membership
Eintreten über OECD for coal finance phase-out
Drängen auf G20 commitment to end international coal financing (South Korea pledged to end overseas coal finance in 2021)
i: Ministry of Environment (환경부) — Umweltbehörde. KFEM (환경운동연합) — South Korea's largest Umwelt- NGO. Solutions for Our Climate (기후솔루션) — climate policy advocacy organization.
KEPCO — state electricity company (subsidiary gencos operate coal plants). POSCO — steelmaker, major coal consumer. Samsung, SK Group, Hyundai — major conglomerates with growing RE100 commitments.
MOTIE — energy and industry ministry. K-ETS — Korea Emissions Trading Scheme (launched 2015, covers ~70% of national Emissionen). KPX (한국전력거래소) — electricity market operator.

국회 (National Assembly) — unicameral, 300 members. Contact through assembly.go.kr. South Korea is a presidential republic with competitive elections. G20 member, OECD member, Powering Past Coal Alliance member (joined 2021).
